synopsis: ★ 榮獲柏林影展銀熊獎評審團大獎 ★ 榮獲柏林影展人道精神獎 ★
tmdb_overview: 為了促進經濟發展，政府在偏遠地區為 80 歲以上的老人建立了隔離安養院，確保他們衣食無憂地度過晚年。77 歲的德蕾莎一生在亞馬遜的穆里蒂村度過，直到某天接到政府的命令，因為年齡門檻下修，要求她搬遷到隔離區。距離轉移的日子只剩幾天，德蕾莎決定挑戰命運，踏上穿越亞馬遜的旅程，實現她人生的最後一個願望：搭飛機。在躲避政府追捕的過程中，德蕾莎穿梭於亞馬遜的河流之間，卻未曾想過這趟旅程將遠比她想像的更加不可思議。
tmdb_overview_en: In the name of economic recovery, the Brazilian Government created a perennial system of compulsory vertical isolation for seniors over 80 to be confined in a colony. Teca is 77 and lives in the village of Muriti, in the Amazon, when she is surprised by the announcement of the age reduction, including her age group. Cornered, Teca makes an intriguing journey hidden from the officers amidst rivers, boats and the underworld to clandestinely try to fulfill her last dream, to take a plane ride.

director: 艾蜜莉阿特金斯 Amalie Atkins
synopsis: 生命是被眷顧的　每一天都是禮物 在加拿大馬尼托巴省的廣袤平原上，年邁的阿嘉莎（Agatha Bock）獨自守著五十四英畝的家族農場。這裡沒有自來水、沒有手機，甚至連市內電話也無法正常使用。在沒有駕照與汽車的情況下，阿嘉莎構築了一個自給自足的「手工宇宙」。她親手耕耘、保存代代相傳的種子，西瓜、豆類、花卉、香草與蔬菜在她的照料下生機盎然，不僅展現她對秩序的堅持，傳授無數農事智慧。阿嘉莎以純粹而獨立的姿態與土地共同呼吸，完成一場跨越四季的生命之詩。本片由阿嘉莎的姪女──當代藝術家艾蜜莉阿特金斯領銜全女性攝製團隊，歷時六年完成，見證阿嘉莎從86歲到90歲的歲月沉澱。全片以16mm膠捲拍攝，保留手作影像的顆粒質感，映照阿嘉莎以雙手耕作的日常。這不僅是一部關於高齡生活的紀錄，更是一部兼具日常與藝術構成的影像年鑑，一場跨越四季的生命之詩。 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving traditional practices through daily routines that document a fading way of life.
tmdb_overview: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.
tmdb_overview_en: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.

synopsis: France | 103min | Chinese Subtitles | 輔12 日舞影展 最佳編劇 坎城影展 導演雙週單元 閉幕片 金球獎 戲劇類最佳女主角提名 「寶貝對不起，生在這世界上爛事就是會找上你，但不要怕，有我陪著你。」看著身邊的朋友離開、成家、展開新生活，畢業後還留在母校任職的年輕文學系教授安格妮絲，內心似乎被凍結在那場難以跨越的「壞事」裡。日子如常繼續，看不見的傷口卻隱隱作痛，所幸在摯友的來訪陪伴、善意的新關係展開下，安格妮絲得以重新感受自我存在的溫柔與勇氣，以自己的節奏，找回活著的意義。美國新銳才女艾娃維克多自編導演首部劇情長片，由《月光下的藍色男孩》、《日麗》製作團隊與A24共同打造。《寶貝對不起》跳脫傳統創傷敘事的框架，融合黑色幽默與客觀凝視，透過友情、孤獨與微小而真實的日常片刻，細膩描繪一段關於倖存、理解及療癒的生命旅程。 After a tragic event, a woman finds herself alone while everyone else continues with their lives as if nothing had happened.
tmdb_overview: 久別重聚，友情依舊。同窗好友大步向前，結婚、懷孕、誕兒，艾麗絲只能踽踽獨行，尋索自己的人生路。校園性侵事件發生後，生活如是繼續：在母校教學升遷、與舊同學飯聚、被召任陪審員、與鄰居展開戀情……一切彷彿如常，看不見的傷口卻依然隱隱作痛，只怕驚恐攸然來襲，把人殺個措手不及。五個章節不按時序，任錯落情緒在回憶的倒帶和快進中跌宕。
tmdb_overview_en: Agnes feels stuck. Unlike her best friend, Lydie, who’s moved to New York and is now expecting a baby, Agnes still lives in the New England house they once shared as graduate students, now working as a professor at her alma mater. A ‘bad thing’ happened to Agnes a few years ago and, since then, despite her best efforts, life hasn’t gotten back on track.

synopsis: 東京體育電影大獎最佳女主角 日本電影金像獎最佳女主角提名 日本電影專業大獎最佳女演員 電影旬報年度十大佳片 坎城影展一種注目 東京不起眼的老舊公寓，是專屬於秀雄與充氣娃娃小望的天地，秀雄每晚抱著小望洗澡、發洩性慾，共度寂寥長夜。某日早晨，小望的「心」悄悄萌芽，她滿懷好奇步出公寓，在影音出租店遇見令她心儀的店員純一。白天，小望和純一一起工作，看著陌生顧客來來去去，夜裡，她回到公寓，繼續扮演秀雄的性玩具。她設法掩藏自己盛滿空氣的軀體，卻不慎在純一面前劃破脆弱的表皮。（取自金馬影展官網） Director Kore-eda Hirokazu, known for such films as Nobody Knows and Still Walking, adapts Gouda Yoshiie's short manga "The Pneumatic Figure of a Girl" into this fantasy-romance. tmdb_overview: 《橫山家之味》導演是枝裕和與韓國人氣女星裴斗娜首度合作，李屏賓攝影、入選2009坎城影展的新作。裴斗娜不僅大膽裸露、化身充氣娃娃，鏡頭裡的她，更神奇地展現了身體隨充氣所產生的變化，以及人偶之間微妙的差異。可說是在寫實的視覺風格下創造奇幻快感的風格之作。在東京街道老舊的公寓中，充氣娃娃和中年男子秀雄一起生活著，她不能說話也不會動，卻是秀雄唯一的伴侶，每天陪著寂寞的秀雄晚餐、洗澡和入眠。某個雨後的早晨，奇蹟般的，充氣娃娃突然神奇地活了過來，成了美麗的女僕裝女孩，充氣娃娃有了一顆心，引領著她去發現外面的世界，遇見過著各式各樣生活的人們，在這一天的傍晚，充氣娃娃走近一間錄影帶店，午後閃閃的光影中，她遇見了年輕的店員純一，並愛上了他。於是娃娃開始在店裡工作，。一切是那樣的完美，直到她意外的劃破手腕，在純一面前洩了氣…。為了瞭解充氣娃娃與主人和「男友」間的愛情關係，導演是枝裕和實地造訪充氣娃娃公司，瞭解製造過程，還從3名充氣娃娃宅男愛用者身上得悉更多細節。 是枝裕和說，片中「主人」在買來第一天會為娃娃買蛋糕點蠟燭慶生、接著一起泡澡「溫暖」娃娃的身體等猶如儀式的過程，都是真實世界中「主人」常做的事。他們還會推著坐在輪椅上的娃娃上公園散步，甚至組成社團，各自帶著娃娃相約泡湯拍照留念。「也許有人覺得下流，但深入瞭解會慢慢同情這些人，因為他們和社會格格不入。」
tmdb_overview_en: A life-size, inflatable sex doll suddenly comes to life one day. Without her owner knowing, she goes for a walk around town and falls in love with Junichi. She starts to date Junichi and gets a job at the same store where he works. Everything seems to be going perfectly for her until something unexpected happens.

synopsis: 1921年，未來的諾貝爾文學獎得主路易吉皮藍德羅回到他心愛的西西里島，參加他的導師、知名小說家兼劇作家喬萬尼維爾加的80大壽。一抵達阿格里真托，突如其來的消息讓他陷入回憶。這段荒謬又奇幻的旅程讓他直面過去，推動他創作出代表作《六個尋找作者的劇中人》，將在二十世紀的戲劇界掀起一場全球革命。
source_language_note: 語言 義大利語 字幕 中文
tmdb_overview: A group of young miners venture into the Gold Spike Mine in search of gold, even after being warned by old-time prospectors to stay away. The miners proceed into the caverns anyway and soon realize that there’s no gold in these mines, but also that they’re not alone.
tmdb_overview_en: A group of young miners venture into the Gold Spike Mine in search of gold, even after being warned by old-time prospectors to stay away. The miners proceed into the caverns anyway and soon realize that there’s no gold in these mines, but also that they’re not alone.

movie_title: 感官世界 數位修復版
movie_title_en: In the Realm of the Senses
synopsis: 真實事件改編 挑戰日本電檢尺度 百年影史經典性愛禁片首度在台院線上映 曾是當紅藝妓的酒館服務生阿部定，與已婚的老闆石田吉藏有了不倫戀，兩人只要有空檔，常常就近或到偏僻地點幽會。隨著投入情感越深，阿部定對於石田吉藏妻子的存在越是無法忍受。戀情被揭發後，阿部定更是無法接受情夫的身體不單屬於自己。當殘酷現實無法改變，兩人跟著世界一起沉淪，瘋狂做愛，在彼此的歡愉中放縱性本能，奔向死亡本能，在不斷突破性愛的極限中，終於達到絕對的佔有。 A passionate telling of the story of Sada Abe, a woman whose affair with her master led to an obsessive and ultimately destructive sexual relationship. 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving traditional practices through daily routines that document a fading way of life.
synopsis_en: Abe Sada, a tavern waitress and former celebrated geisha, enters into an illicit affair with her married employer, Kichizo Ishida. They seize every spare moment for secret trysts, meeting in nearby rooms or secluded hideaways. As her feelings intensify, Sada finds the existence of Kichizo’s wife increasingly unbearable. Once their affair is exposed, she becomes consumed by the realization that her lover’s body does not belong to her alone. Faced with a reality they cannot change, the two descend into a world of their own, surrendering to a frenzy of carnal desire. Indulging their sexual instincts and racing toward the death drive, they push the boundaries of eroticism to the limit, finally achieving a state of absolute possession.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2026 香港電影評論學會大獎最佳導演、最佳男主角等3項大獎；最佳電影、最佳編劇等3項提名 ★全球票房4.3億臺幣 落魄的私家偵探歐陽偉業收到委託：旅行社老闆要求他調查自己的女朋友，而她竟是歐陽偉業的妻子關詠心，敵不過內心煎熬，他放棄為另一個客戶尋找失蹤未婚妻，趕往酒店捉姦，沒想到客戶的未婚妻在他離開現場後被殺，原以為普通出軌事件竟變成謀殺案！為阻止兇手殺害下一個目標，歐陽偉業必須力挽狂瀾。 https://reurl.cc/2aOzom
tmdb_overview: 落魄的私家偵探歐陽偉業收到委託：旅行社老闆要求他調查自己的女朋友，而她竟是歐陽偉業的妻子關詠心，敵不過內心煎熬，他放棄為另一個客戶尋找失蹤未婚妻，趕往酒店捉姦，沒想到客戶的未婚妻在他離開現場後被殺，原以為普通出軌事件竟變成謀殺案！為阻止兇手殺害下一個目標，歐陽偉業必須力挽狂瀾。
tmdb_overview_en: Au Yeung Wai Yip is a private detective who has been focusing on missing persons and adultery investigations for many years. One day, he received a "special" commission: the owner of the travel agency had asked him to investigate his girlfriend, who happened to be Au Yeung Wai Yip’s wife.Being a private detective, he is used to looking for the truth with cold eyes for his clients, but he finds it difficult to face the truth about their own marriage. Unable to withstand his inner torment, Au Yeung Wai Yip gave up on another ongoing case - a client's search for his missing fiancée - and went to the hotel to catch the adulterer. Unfortunately, the marriage could not be saved in the end, and the client's fiancée was killed after he left. A seemingly ordinary affair turned into a murderous incident!

director: 卡勞瑟爾賓漢耶 Kaouther Ben Hania
synopsis: Cyprus | 89min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展 評審團大獎！首映鼓掌聲創最高讚譽紀錄 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳國際影片 提名 金球獎 最佳外語片 提名 歐洲電影節 最佳音效設計、最佳歐洲電影 入圍 奧斯卡名導 卡勞瑟爾賓漢耶 繼《出走的女兒》《販膚走卒》後最新力作 源自一名六歲女孩的真實求救電話 2024年1月29日，紅新月會接獲一通緊急求救電話。戰火爆發之際，一名年僅六歲的女孩獨自受困車內，她在通話中哭喊「我好害怕...坦克車就在我身旁。」眼看救援時間不斷流逝，砲火轟鳴與尖叫聲也從未間斷，志工們只能在未知中盼望奇蹟，危機卻步步逼近......。《欣德之聲》改編自加薩戰爭的真實事件，通話聲取材自紅新月會保存錄音。以分秒必爭的救援行動，重現欣德受困戰火的危急時刻，呈現長年衝突下被迫改變的日常，也於道德與生存交錯的抉擇之間，折射出隱於漫天塵土的人性微光。 Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A 6-year old girl is trapped in a car under IDF fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her.
tmdb_overview: 榮獲2025年威尼斯影展評審團大獎。 2024年1月29日，巴勒斯坦紅新月會志願者接到一通緊急電話，加沙地區一名6歲困於一輛熊熊燃燒的汽車中，亟待救援。志願者團隊一邊與她保持通話，一邊竭力派出救護車前往救援。這位女孩名叫欣德·拉賈布。
tmdb_overview_en: January 29, 2024. Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A five-year old girl is trapped in a car under fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her. Her name was Hind Rajab.

director: 艾蜜莉阿特金斯 Amalie Atkins
synopsis: 生命是被眷顧的　每一天都是禮物 在加拿大馬尼托巴省的廣袤平原上，年邁的阿嘉莎（Agatha Bock）獨自守著五十四英畝的家族農場。這裡沒有自來水、沒有手機，甚至連市內電話也無法正常使用。在沒有駕照與汽車的情況下，阿嘉莎構築了一個自給自足的「手工宇宙」。她親手耕耘、保存代代相傳的種子，西瓜、豆類、花卉、香草與蔬菜在她的照料下生機盎然，不僅展現她對秩序的堅持，傳授無數農事智慧。阿嘉莎以純粹而獨立的姿態與土地共同呼吸，完成一場跨越四季的生命之詩。本片由阿嘉莎的姪女──當代藝術家艾蜜莉阿特金斯領銜全女性攝製團隊，歷時六年完成，見證阿嘉莎從86歲到90歲的歲月沉澱。全片以16mm膠捲拍攝，保留手作影像的顆粒質感，映照阿嘉莎以雙手耕作的日常。這不僅是一部關於高齡生活的紀錄，更是一部兼具日常與藝術構成的影像年鑑，一場跨越四季的生命之詩。 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving traditional practices through daily routines that document a fading way of life.
tmdb_overview: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.
tmdb_overview_en: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.

synopsis: 東京體育電影大獎最佳女主角 日本電影金像獎最佳女主角提名 日本電影專業大獎最佳女演員 電影旬報年度十大佳片 坎城影展一種注目 東京不起眼的老舊公寓，是專屬於秀雄與充氣娃娃小望的天地，秀雄每晚抱著小望洗澡、發洩性慾，共度寂寥長夜。某日早晨，小望的「心」悄悄萌芽，她滿懷好奇步出公寓，在影音出租店遇見令她心儀的店員純一。白天，小望和純一一起工作，看著陌生顧客來來去去，夜裡，她回到公寓，繼續扮演秀雄的性玩具。她設法掩藏自己盛滿空氣的軀體，卻不慎在純一面前劃破脆弱的表皮。（取自金馬影展官網） Director Kore-eda Hirokazu, known for such films as Nobody Knows and Still Walking, adapts Gouda Yoshiie's short manga "The Pneumatic Figure of a Girl" into this fantasy-romance. The relations between the ultra-real doll with a heart and her lonely companions is visualized with an intertwining sense of buoyancy and eroticism. Starring in her second Japanese film since Linda Linda Linda is accomplished Korean actress Bae Doona. Taiwanese cinematographer Mark Lee Ping-bin beautifully captures the subtler characteristics of Tokyo's urban scenery. Middle-aged Hideo (Itao Itsuji) lives in an old apartment with his blow-up doll Nozomi (Bae). One morning, she suddenly grows a heart. While Hideo is out at work Nozomi cheerfully dresses up in a French maid's outfit and enjoys walks through the neighbourhood with the curiosity of a child. She ends up at a local video shop where Junichi (Arata) works and falls in love at first sight. Nozomi herself begins working at the shop out of love and discovers the transient nature of human emotions, but also feels the same emptiness in her heart that Junichi does.

tmdb_overview_en: A life-size, inflatable sex doll suddenly comes to life one day. Without her owner knowing, she goes for a walk around town and falls in love with Junichi. She starts to date Junichi and gets a job at the same store where he works. Everything seems to be going perfectly for her until something unexpected happens.

synopsis: France | 103min | Chinese Subtitles | 輔12 日舞影展 最佳編劇 坎城影展 導演雙週單元 閉幕片 金球獎 戲劇類最佳女主角提名 「寶貝對不起，生在這世界上爛事就是會找上你，但不要怕，有我陪著你。」看著身邊的朋友離開、成家、展開新生活，畢業後還留在母校任職的年輕文學系教授安格妮絲，內心似乎被凍結在那場難以跨越的「壞事」裡。日子如常繼續，看不見的傷口卻隱隱作痛，所幸在摯友的來訪陪伴、善意的新關係展開下，安格妮絲得以重新感受自我存在的溫柔與勇氣，以自己的節奏，找回活著的意義。美國新銳才女艾娃維克多自編導演首部劇情長片，由《月光下的藍色男孩》、《日麗》製作團隊與A24共同打造。《寶貝對不起》跳脫傳統創傷敘事的框架，融合黑色幽默與客觀凝視，透過友情、孤獨與微小而真實的日常片刻，細膩描繪一段關於倖存、理解及療癒的生命旅程。 After a tragic event, a woman finds herself alone while everyone else continues with their lives as if nothing had happened.
tmdb_overview: 久別重聚，友情依舊。同窗好友大步向前，結婚、懷孕、誕兒，艾麗絲只能踽踽獨行，尋索自己的人生路。校園性侵事件發生後，生活如是繼續：在母校教學升遷、與舊同學飯聚、被召任陪審員、與鄰居展開戀情……一切彷彿如常，看不見的傷口卻依然隱隱作痛，只怕驚恐攸然來襲，把人殺個措手不及。五個章節不按時序，任錯落情緒在回憶的倒帶和快進中跌宕。
tmdb_overview_en: Agnes feels stuck. Unlike her best friend, Lydie, who’s moved to New York and is now expecting a baby, Agnes still lives in the New England house they once shared as graduate students, now working as a professor at her alma mater. A ‘bad thing’ happened to Agnes a few years ago and, since then, despite her best efforts, life hasn’t gotten back on track.

synopsis: 東京體育電影大獎最佳女主角 日本電影金像獎最佳女主角提名 日本電影專業大獎最佳女演員 電影旬報年度十大佳片 坎城影展一種注目 東京不起眼的老舊公寓，是專屬於秀雄與充氣娃娃小望的天地，秀雄每晚抱著小望洗澡、發洩性慾，共度寂寥長夜。某日早晨，小望的「心」悄悄萌芽，她滿懷好奇步出公寓，在影音出租店遇見令她心儀的店員純一。白天，小望和純一一起工作，看著陌生顧客來來去去，夜裡，她回到公寓，繼續扮演秀雄的性玩具。她設法掩藏自己盛滿空氣的軀體，卻不慎在純一面前劃破脆弱的表皮。（取自金馬影展官網） Director Kore-eda Hirokazu, known for such films as Nobody Knows and Still Walking, adapts Gouda Yoshiie's short manga "The Pneumatic Figure of a Girl" into this fantasy-romance. The relations between the ultra-real doll with a heart and her lonely companions is visualized with an intertwining sense of buoyancy and eroticism. Starring in her second Japanese film since Linda Linda Linda is accomplished Korean actress Bae Doona. Taiwanese cinematographer Mark Lee Ping-bin beautifully captures the subtler characteristics of Tokyo's urban scenery. Middle-aged Hideo (Itao Itsuji) lives in an old apartment with his blow-up doll Nozomi (Bae). One morning, she suddenly grows a heart. While Hideo is out at work Nozomi cheerfully dresses up in a French maid's outfit and enjoys walks through the neighbourhood with the curiosity of a child. She ends up at a local video shop where Junichi (Arata) works and falls in love at first sight. Nozomi herself begins working at the shop out of love and discovers the transient nature of human emotions, but also feels the same emptiness in her heart that Junichi does.
tmdb_overview: 《橫山家之味》導演是枝裕和與韓國人氣女星裴斗娜首度合作，李屏賓攝影、入選2009坎城影展的新作。裴斗娜不僅大膽裸露、化身充氣娃娃，鏡頭裡的她，更神奇地展現了身體隨充氣所產生的變化，以及人偶之間微妙的差異。可說是在寫實的視覺風格下創造奇幻快感的風格之作。在東京街道老舊的公寓中，充氣娃娃和中年男子秀雄一起生活著，她不能說話也不會動，卻是秀雄唯一的伴侶，每天陪著寂寞的秀雄晚餐、洗澡和入眠。某個雨後的早晨，奇蹟般的，充氣娃娃突然神奇地活了過來，成了美麗的女僕裝女孩，充氣娃娃有了一顆心，引領著她去發現外面的世界，遇見過著各式各樣生活的人們，在這一天的傍晚，充氣娃娃走近一間錄影帶店，午後閃閃的光影中，她遇見了年輕的店員純一，並愛上了他。於是娃娃開始在店裡工作，。一切是那樣的完美，直到她意外的劃破手腕，在純一面前洩了氣…。為了瞭解充氣娃娃與主人和「男友」間的愛情關係，導演是枝裕和實地造訪充氣娃娃公司，瞭解製造過程，還從3名充氣娃娃宅男愛用者身上得悉更多細節。 是枝裕和說，片中「主人」在買來第一天會為娃娃買蛋糕點蠟燭慶生、接著一起泡澡「溫暖」娃娃的身體等猶如儀式的過程，都是真實世界中「主人」常做的事。他們還會推著坐在輪椅上的娃娃上公園散步，甚至組成社團，各自帶著娃娃相約泡湯拍照留念。「也許有人覺得下流，但深入瞭解會慢慢同情這些人，因為他們和社會格格不入。」
tmdb_overview_en: A life-size, inflatable sex doll suddenly comes to life one day. Without her owner knowing, she goes for a walk around town and falls in love with Junichi. She starts to date Junichi and gets a job at the same store where he works. Everything seems to be going perfectly for her until something unexpected happens.

director: 卡勞瑟爾賓漢耶 Kaouther Ben Hania
synopsis: Cyprus | 89min | C/E Subtitles | 輔12 威尼斯影展 評審團大獎！首映鼓掌聲創最高讚譽紀錄 奧斯卡金像獎 最佳國際影片 提名 金球獎 最佳外語片 提名 歐洲電影節 最佳音效設計、最佳歐洲電影 入圍 奧斯卡名導 卡勞瑟爾賓漢耶 繼《出走的女兒》《販膚走卒》後最新力作 源自一名六歲女孩的真實求救電話 2024年1月29日，紅新月會接獲一通緊急求救電話。戰火爆發之際，一名年僅六歲的女孩獨自受困車內，她在通話中哭喊「我好害怕...坦克車就在我身旁。」眼看救援時間不斷流逝，砲火轟鳴與尖叫聲也從未間斷，志工們只能在未知中盼望奇蹟，危機卻步步逼近......。《欣德之聲》改編自加薩戰爭的真實事件，通話聲取材自紅新月會保存錄音。以分秒必爭的救援行動，重現欣德受困戰火的危急時刻，呈現長年衝突下被迫改變的日常，也於道德與生存交錯的抉擇之間，折射出隱於漫天塵土的人性微光。 Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A 6-year old girl is trapped in a car under IDF fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her.
tmdb_overview: 榮獲2025年威尼斯影展評審團大獎。 2024年1月29日，巴勒斯坦紅新月會志願者接到一通緊急電話，加沙地區一名6歲困於一輛熊熊燃燒的汽車中，亟待救援。志願者團隊一邊與她保持通話，一邊竭力派出救護車前往救援。這位女孩名叫欣德·拉賈布。
tmdb_overview_en: January 29, 2024. Red Crescent volunteers receive an emergency call. A five-year old girl is trapped in a car under fire in Gaza, pleading for rescue. While trying to keep her on the line, they do everything they can to get an ambulance to her. Her name was Hind Rajab.

A ‘bad thing’ happened to Agnes a few years ago and, since then, despite her best efforts, life hasn’t gotten back on track.

director: 艾蜜莉阿特金斯 Amalie Atkins
synopsis: 生命是被眷顧的　每一天都是禮物 在加拿大馬尼托巴省的廣袤平原上，年邁的阿嘉莎（Agatha Bock）獨自守著五十四英畝的家族農場。這裡沒有自來水、沒有手機，甚至連市內電話也無法正常使用。在沒有駕照與汽車的情況下，阿嘉莎構築了一個自給自足的「手工宇宙」。她親手耕耘、保存代代相傳的種子，西瓜、豆類、花卉、香草與蔬菜在她的照料下生機盎然，不僅展現她對秩序的堅持，傳授無數農事智慧。阿嘉莎以純粹而獨立的姿態與土地共同呼吸，完成一場跨越四季的生命之詩。本片由阿嘉莎的姪女──當代藝術家艾蜜莉阿特金斯領銜全女性攝製團隊，歷時六年完成，見證阿嘉莎從86歲到90歲的歲月沉澱。全片以16mm膠捲拍攝，保留手作影像的顆粒質感，映照阿嘉莎以雙手耕作的日常。這不僅是一部關於高齡生活的紀錄，更是一部兼具日常與藝術構成的影像年鑑，一場跨越四季的生命之詩。 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving traditional practices through daily routines that document a fading way of life.
tmdb_overview: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.
tmdb_overview_en: Defying modernity, 90-year-old Agatha forges a solitary existence on her ancestral farm preserving heirloom seeds.

tmdb_overview: 《橫山家之味》導演是枝裕和與韓國人氣女星裴斗娜首度合作，李屏賓攝影、入選2009坎城影展的新作。裴斗娜不僅大膽裸露、化身充氣娃娃，鏡頭裡的她，更神奇地展現了身體隨充氣所產生的變化，以及人偶之間微妙的差異。可說是在寫實的視覺風格下創造奇幻快感的風格之作。在東京街道老舊的公寓中，充氣娃娃和中年男子秀雄一起生活著，她不能說話也不會動，卻是秀雄唯一的伴侶，每天陪著寂寞的秀雄晚餐、洗澡和入眠。某個雨後的早晨，奇蹟般的，充氣娃娃突然神奇地活了過來，成了美麗的女僕裝女孩，充氣娃娃有了一顆心，引領著她去發現外面的世界，遇見過著各式各樣生活的人們，在這一天的傍晚，充氣娃娃走近一間錄影帶店，午後閃閃的光影中，她遇見了年輕的店員純一，並愛上了他。於是娃娃開始在店裡工作，。一切是那樣的完美，直到她意外的劃破手腕，在純一面前洩了氣…。為了瞭解充氣娃娃與主人和「男友」間的愛情關係，導演是枝裕和實地造訪充氣娃娃公司，瞭解製造過程，還從3名充氣娃娃宅男愛用者身上得悉更多細節。 是枝裕和說，片中「主人」在買來第一天會為娃娃買蛋糕點蠟燭慶生、接著一起泡澡「溫暖」娃娃的身體等猶如儀式的過程，都是真實世界中「主人」常做的事。他們還會推著坐在輪椅上的娃娃上公園散步，甚至組成社團，各自帶著娃娃相約泡湯拍照留念。「也許有人覺得下流，但深入瞭解會慢慢同情這些人，因為他們和社會格格不入。」
tmdb_overview_en: A life-size, inflatable sex doll suddenly comes to life one day. Without her owner knowing, she goes for a walk around town and falls in love with Junichi. She starts to date Junichi and gets a job at the same store where he works. Everything seems to be going perfectly for her until something unexpected happens.

movie_title: 感官世界 數位修復版
movie_title_en: In the Realm of the Senses
synopsis: 真實事件改編 挑戰日本電檢尺度 百年影史經典性愛禁片首度在台院線上映 曾是當紅藝妓的酒館服務生阿部定，與已婚的老闆石田吉藏有了不倫戀，兩人只要有空檔，常常就近或到偏僻地點幽會。隨著投入情感越深，阿部定對於石田吉藏妻子的存在越是無法忍受。戀情被揭發後，阿部定更是無法接受情夫的身體不單屬於自己。當殘酷現實無法改變，兩人跟著世界一起沉淪，瘋狂做愛，在彼此的歡愉中放縱性本能，奔向死亡本能，在不斷突破性愛的極限中，終於達到絕對的佔有。 A passionate telling of the story of Sada Abe, a woman whose affair with her master led to an obsessive and ultimately destructive sexual relationship. 90-year-old Agatha Bock maintains her ancestral farm and heirloom seeds without modern amenities, preserving traditional practices through daily routines that document a fading way of life.
synopsis_en: Abe Sada, a tavern waitress and former celebrated geisha, enters into an illicit affair with her married employer, Kichizo Ishida. They seize every spare moment for secret trysts, meeting in nearby rooms or secluded hideaways. As her feelings intensify, Sada finds the existence of Kichizo’s wife increasingly unbearable. Once their affair is exposed, she becomes consumed by the realization that her lover’s body does not belong to her alone. Faced with a reality they cannot change, the two descend into a world of their own, surrendering to a frenzy of carnal desire. Indulging their sexual instincts and racing toward the death drive, they push the boundaries of eroticism to the limit, finally achieving a state of absolute possession.

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★改編自花澤健吾於「Young Magazine」週刊連載之漫畫原著 ★《銀魂》、《新解釋・三國志》導演福田雄一最新力作 二次世界大戰後，日本將忍者組織廢除，然而仍有為數 20萬的忍者隱藏在現代社會的各個角落，執行各種暗殺或秘密任務。部分精銳忍者，在國家級的對抗中負責秘密任務；另一方面，下級忍者卻經常拿不到工作，其中之一的雲隱九郎正是，過著宛如尼特族般的生活。直到某日，他接下了滲透進講談高中的任務…… https://reurl.cc/ppzmee
tmdb_overview: 第二次世界大戰後，日本因為戰敗而必須將忍者組織廢除，然而仍有為數20萬的忍者隱藏在現代日本社會的各個角落，部分精銳忍者，在國家級的對抗中負責執行秘密任務，相當活躍，下級忍者卻是經常拿不到工作，其中之一的雲隱九郎也一樣，過著宛如尼特族般的生活，他在歷經長期失業後，接下滲透進講談高中的任務……
tmdb_overview_en: The once-proud Japanese Ninja disappeared after the war when GHQ disbanded their organization.However, in reality ninjas still exist secretly and it is said that there are 200 thousand of them.And some elite ninjas are secretly operating behind the scenes in national-level struggles.On the other hand, grassroots ninjas often cannot find jobs, and one of them, Yun Yin Jiu Lang, also lives a life similar to that of the NEET generation.However, there is finally a major "endurance" around Ninomaru!

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
country: 香港 Hong Kong﹑台灣 Taiwan
synopsis: 2026 台灣國際紀錄片影展台灣競賽首獎 Grand Prize for Taiwan Competition, TIDF 2019年香港歷史性的風暴中，導演在赴台求學前一個月，因一則來自父親的消息，被無限期滯留在當下。隔年香港疫情封城，身處台灣的導演與留港父親展開漫長的Skype對話，沉默的鏡頭中滾動著巨大的憂傷與說不出口的困惑。穿越破碎的創傷記憶，兩個倖存的男人，試圖笨拙地觸碰彼此陌生而糾結的心。

tmdb_overview: 2019年香港歷史性的風暴中，導演在赴台求學前一個月，因一則來自父親的消息，被無限期滯留在當下。隔年香港疫情封城，身在台灣的導演與留港父親展開漫長的Skype對話，沈默的鏡頭中滾動著巨大的憂傷與說不出口的困惑，穿越破碎的創傷記憶，兩個倖存的男人，試圖笨拙地觸碰彼此陌生而糾結的心。
tmdb_overview_en: During the turmoil of 2019 Hong Kong, before pursuing his studies in Taiwan, the director was abruptly frozen in the present by a message from his father. As Hong Kong entered a pandemic lockdown, the director, now in Taiwan, began to Skype call his father, unpacking his traumatic memories and their entangled hearts.

synopsis: 門票包含海水浴場門票（海水浴場最早1pm 可以入場），本場地寵物友善
screen_name: 福隆海水浴場
tmdb_overview: 劇情敘述年輕人杰西到歐洲旅遊，在火車上和一名法國女子偶遇，杰西對法國女孩席琳一見鍾情，兩人交談甚為投機，無奈火車即將到站，眼見兩人就要分手，但總覺意猶未盡，杰西於是說動女孩下車和他共遊維也納，黎明破曉時兩人便各分東西。  兩人下車後在古老的維也納四處閒逛，在途中聊了許多對人生、對愛情、對夢想的看法，兩人心靈契合，但不願交換電話住址導致最後不了了之的俗套，因此決議好好過完最後一夜。黎明破曉，兩人分手，互相愛慕的兩人拋開先前不羈絆對方的約束，允諾在半年後於同一地點相聚，不管兩人未來是否還能見面，但這僅有的一夜叫人永誌難忘。
tmdb_overview_en: An unexpected meeting on a train leads two travelers to spend an evening wandering through Vienna. As the night unfolds, they share stories and conversations about life and love, exploring new ideas while a quiet intimacy grows between them, knowing it may be their only night together.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
synopsis: ★ 7/4場次由資深影評人蒲鋒出席映後座談 Post-screening talk with film critic PO Fung 少女愛奴遭誘拐淪為娼妓，在肉慾橫流的「四季春」妓院中受盡凌辱。她孤注一擲，以同性禁戀換取鴇母春姨的絕世武藝，為化身冷豔花魁，向蹂躪她的嫖客報復，但與春姨那份始於算計的情仇，竟在血洗深仇的終點，徒留一抹難解的悵惘。 在陽剛暴力主宰銀幕的1970年代，邱剛健大膽挑戰情慾禁忌，將扭曲的愛與復仇交織成致命的動作與浪漫奇情之作。導演楚原構築出如夢似幻的罪惡之城，影像風格有如當時日本的異色剝削電影。即便放到當代眼光審視，本片在主流電影體制下所展現的先鋒與突破性，依舊令人震撼。
tags: 【紅樓暗湧：邱剛健編劇作品選】

screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
tmdb_title: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
tmdb_title_en: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
tmdb_overview: 柔弱少女金娥，被賣入妓院強迫接客，受盡欺凌，悲憤之餘，假意奉承，化名愛奴，跟鴇母春姨學習奇特武功，又投其所好與春發展一段同性戀，目的就是報仇，後來愛奴將曾競投她初夜的嫖客逐一殺死……
tmdb_overview_en: 18-year-old Ainu is kidnapped and sold to a brothel. Her good looks and wild personality make her very popular with the lustful clients, but also draw the lesbian attentions of brothel madam Chun Yi. Chun Yi teaches Ainu the ways of lust and the ways of kung fu, and Ainu becomes more and more similar to her captor. But rage at her treatment is still burning inside her.

synopsis: ★2024 美國兒童選擇獎最喜愛動畫電影提名 ★全球票房2.57億美元 加菲貓是一隻討厭星期一、愛吃千層麵的慵懶家貓，牠即將展開一場出走家門的瘋狂大冒險！日復一日，加菲貓過著平靜舒服的家庭生活，沒想到某天竟突然遭遇綁架，加菲貓與牠忠實的狗狗夥伴歐弟，不情願地與失散多年的父親—放蕩不羈的流浪街貓維克意外重逢。壞壞貓咪金珂絲因不滿曾遭到同為犯罪集團的維克的背叛，因而策劃這次綁架行動，並脅迫加菲貓前往農場偷取牛奶，好補償金珂絲過去的損失。被迫離開溫暖舒適生活的加菲貓，只好連同歐弟、維克進行一場風險極高又充滿滑稽、有史以來最大的牛奶偷竊行動。 https://reurl.cc/A9QgvE
tmdb_overview: 全球知名的、討厭星期一、熱愛吃義大利千層麵的加菲貓，即將踏上一場瘋狂的戶外冒險！在牠與失散多年的父親意外重逢後，加菲貓和牠的狗朋友歐弟被迫離開原本舒適的生活，與維克一同踏上了一場風險重重、令人捧腹的搶劫冒險。
tmdb_overview_en: Garfield, the world-famous, Monday-hating, lasagna-loving indoor cat, is about to have a wild outdoor adventure! After an unexpected reunion with his long-lost father – scruffy street cat Vic – Garfield and his canine friend Odie are forced from their perfectly pampered life into joining Vic in a hilarious, high-stakes heist.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 布萊德利貝爾 Bradley BELL、帕布羅瓊斯索勒 Pablo JONES-SOLER
synopsis: 2021 SXSW影展 SXSW FF 2021 多倫多Inside Out LBGT影展 Inside Out Toronto LGBT FF 2021 雪菲爾德紀錄片影展 Sheffield IDF 2020年春季，原 定 展開巡演的恰莉困於疫情，偕男友居家隔離。封閉時局強碰熾熱戀情，雙雙刺激創作慾，恰莉將設備搬到家裡，宅錄多首自在奔放的beat，同步直播匯集悶壞的粉絲共襄盛舉。 LGBTQIA+的Angels來自世界各地，線上共譜詞曲彷彿沒有距離，助恰莉只花六週就完成專輯，推出後廣獲樂評激推肯定，堪稱恰莉最具代表性的作品之一。 雙導演以類Vlog的影像形式，捕捉恰莉最真實的本心，也見證她跨越音樂、視覺與社群的獨特凝聚力。結晶專輯《How I'm Feeling Now》相對簡單粗礪，電子碎拍與清爽旋律卻洋溢真誠及親密。在紀錄／偽紀錄之間，《一同孤獨》和《絢爛一刻》 這兩部片 穿越敘事與時序，鏡射出360度的酷娃恰莉。 In spring 2020, Charli XCX's tour was halted by the pandemic. Quarantining with her boyfriend, isolation and romance fueled her creativity. She recorded raw beats at home, livestreaming with global LGBTQIA+ "Angels" to co-write her acclaimed album
tags: 【進擊的音浪—怪酷派對：怪奇比莉 X 酷娃恰莉】
source_language_note: 發音：英語 字幕：中文
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Discover the process behind Charli XCX’s 2020 quarantine album "how i'm feeling now", created in 40 days during the COVID-19 pandemic, including its semi-collaborative nature with her community of online fans.
tmdb_overview_en: Discover the process behind Charli XCX’s 2020 quarantine album "how i'm feeling now", created in 40 days during the COVID-19 pandemic, including its semi-collaborative nature with her community of online fans.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 中日戰爭烽火正熾，抗日游擊隊員林雪芬奉首領「天字第一號」之命，計畫炸毀漢奸丁邨的電訊總台；丁邨之侄世傑亦為游擊隊成員，潛伏丁宅蒐集情資，與一眾家僕裡應外合，殺得日軍措手不及。眼當任務即將告捷，雪芬與世傑卻雙雙被擒，生死存亡關頭，幕後運籌帷幄的「天字第一號」是否終將現身？ 導演黃卓漢出身廣東，國共內戰後移居香港從事電影映演及發行工作，1952年創立自由影業，1950年代曾來台拍攝《日月潭之戀》等國語片，長年與台灣影壇交流密切。1959年他另組嶺光影業，出品並親自執導多部粵語片。本片同樣改編自1946年國語版的《天字第一號》，由丁瑩、朱江、劉亮華等香港紅星主演，在原作基礎上融入竊聽、街頭槍戰、爆破等現代諜報動作元素，堪稱香港「珍姐邦」（Jane Bond）風潮的秀異之作。 "Special Agent No. 1."
source_language_note: 發音：粵語 字幕：中文▲ ▲影片非英語發音且無英文字幕 Non-English language film without English subtitles.
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: Guerrilla fighter Lam Suet-fan is in charge of the operation which succeeds in crippling the traitorous activities of Ting Chuen. An infuriated Ting strikes back, swamping the occupied territory with spies and exposes the singer disguise of Lam's comrade Laura who is made his mistress. Through the discreet help from Ting's cousin Sai-kit who goes undercover as the traitor's house guest, a series of offensives are launched, resulting in heavy casualties in the Japanese camp. With pressure mounting on both sides, guerrilla leader Lady Spy No.1 entrusts the mission of bombing Ting's signal tower to Lam who will then lead the troop in retreat. The mission fails, leading to the arrest of Lam and Sai-kit. Laura puts her life at stake in order to accomplish the mission and before she expires, reveals herself to be their leader and names Lam her successor to lead the troop to its stronghold in the north. (Synopsis based on audiovisual materials)

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 少年家遭洗劫，雙親血濺荒村，姊姊被擄，他忍痛放火燒毀家園，懷揣亡母留下的銅鈴遠走天涯，決意復仇。途中遇隱名俠士，投拜為師，直至藝成下山，路見不平救助弱女香香，於血海深仇的盡頭，終得以在繁華落盡後，與佳人共尋一席歸家平靜。 邱剛健加入邵氏後名列編劇的首部公映作品，在傳統武俠骨幹中，注入不少異色與懸疑元素，尤其是將銅鈴聲化作復仇的索命符，渲染出肅殺的氛圍。拍攝揉合1960年代義大利西部片與日本武士電影等類型元素，精巧的視角與凌厲的動作調度，成就了新潮武俠電影。

Left with nothing but his mother’s bell-laden bracelet, he sets out to seek his revenge. Lucky for him, Wei Fu encounters a master swordsman, who takes him under his wing.

movie_title: 天字第一號（數位修復版）
synopsis: 抗戰期間，日軍占領東北三省，少女翠英以賣唱維生，與愛國青年周凌雲相戀，卻被迫忍辱嫁給垂涎她的漢奸陳兆群。數年後，陳兆群任偽政府特務機關首腦，為全力追捕國民政府特務「天字第一號」而焦頭爛額。周凌雲作為其外甥，被國民政府吸收後潛入陳家任偽職，卻驚覺當年戀人已成為姑丈之續絃。情感受創之餘，他另起情緣，投身間諜行動，誓圖抗日復國。殊不知，原來叱咤風雲的抗日頭號間諜「天字第一號」竟是⋯⋯。 本片由金馬影帝柯俊雄與「千面女郎」白虹聯合主演，翻拍自1946年轟動上海、屠光啟執導的同名作品，為本土首部自製台語諜報片，不僅創下票房紀錄，更開啟台語間諜片風潮，前後衍生五集系列作品，盛況轟動一時，成為一代觀眾的共同記憶。 resistance agent "Special Agent No. 1," Ling-hun devotes himself to
source_language_note: 發音：台語 字幕：中英

synopsis_en:
During the War of Resistance against Japan, as the Japanese military occupied Northeast China, a young singer named Cuiying fell in love with a patriotic youth, Zhou Lingyun. However, she was forced to endure the humiliation of marrying the collaborator Chen Zhaoqun, who had long lusted after her. Years later, Chen has become the head of the puppet government’s secret service, desperately hunting for the Nationalist government’s legendary "Special Agent No. 1." Zhou Lingyun, now an agent himself, infiltrates Chen’s household under the guise of his nephew to take up a post in the puppet regime, only to be shocked to discover that his former lover is now his uncle’s second wife. Despite his heartbreak, he finds a new romance and dedicates himself to espionage, vowing to resist the occupation and restore the nation. Little did he know that the formidable "Special Agent No. 1" was actually...

Starring Golden Horse Best Actor Ko Chun-hsiung and the "Lady of a Thousand Faces" Pai Hung, this film is a remake of the 1946 Shanghai sensation directed by Tu Guangqi. As the first locally produced Taiwanese-language spy film, it not only shattered box office records but also ignited a craze for the genre, spawning a five-part series that became a cultural phenomenon and a collective memory for a generation of viewers.

tmdb_overview: 由於地球即將毀滅，一群探險家扛起人類史上最重要的任務：越過已知的銀河，在星際間尋找人類未來的可能性。  未來地球的劇烈氣候變化已影響到農業，地球上的農作物難以種植。一隊探險者作為「拯救人類未來計劃」成員，根據理論物理學家基普·索恩的理論，突破科學極限、穿越「蟲洞」進行時間旅行、到太空尋找其他可以種植的農作物...  馬修與安海瑟薇登陸不同的星球探測有機體，遭遇巨浪海嘯來襲；執行任務時，多次面臨個人存亡與拯救地球的掙扎，馬修與女兒的親情刻劃也是重頭戲，片中浩瀚壯麗的宇宙美景令人嚮往。
tmdb_overview_en: The adventures of a group of explorers who make use of a newly discovered wormhole to surpass the limitations on human space travel and conquer the vast distances involved in an interstellar voyage.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1982 坎城影展 Cannes FF 1983 香港電影金像獎最佳電影﹑最佳導演﹑最佳編劇﹑最有前途新人﹑最佳美術指導 Best Picture, Best Director, Best Screenplay, Best New Performer & Best Art Direction, Hong Kong Film Awards 日本記者芥川1975年在峴港見證了越共解放越南。三年後，返回峴港的他因為結識琴娘一家，看見了被當局掩蓋的煉獄真相，也遇見了想盡辦法籌錢逃亡海外的青年祖明。看盡當地苦難的芥川，決意協助琴娘一家，幫他們準備逃離越南。另一方面，祖明也決意登上難民船，投奔怒海……。 自越戰西貢淪陷後，英屬香港曾接收高達20萬名船民，直至2000年才結束最後一個難民營。導演許鞍華藉著對越南難民漂泊的描繪，投射對於香港回歸前途的想像。本片原一舉入選1983年坎城影展主競賽，卻迫於國際外交壓力，最終僅得以觀摩名義放映。當年因批判共產主義，以及因於中國取景拍攝，而同時在中國及台灣雙雙遭到禁映，戲裡戲外皆充滿政治張力。 Three years after the Fall of Saigon, Japanese photojournalist Akutagawa returns to a Vietnam reshaped by the "liberation" of 1975. He strikes up an uneasy kinship with Cam Nuong, a fourteen-year-old and her family—a bond that serves as his portal into the country's suffocating reality. In the shadow of the city's only remaining bar, he encounters Minh, a man desperate to seek funds for his escape. Akutagawa becomes an architect of hope, orchestrating a perilous journey for Cam Nuong and her younger brother. As Minh joins this exodus, their lives converge on a makeshift vessel bound for the "sea of rage."

tmdb_overview: 1975年越共解放越南，日本記者芥川汐見在峴港現場採訪實況。3年後，他重遊舊地，認識了琴娘一家，並拍攝了珍貴照片。當地唯一被留下來的酒吧，由媽媽桑經營，祖明是她的情人，正設法逃離越南。芥川與祖明成了朋友，並獲得特許送祖明到新經濟區挖地雷，但每天都有人因此遇到爆炸而死亡。芥川努力安排琴娘及家人逃離越南，祖明也登上難民船，投奔怒海。
tmdb_overview_en: A Japanese photojournalist revisits Vietnam after the liberation to document the nation, and begins following and documenting the young children from a poor Vietnamese family.

synopsis: 2024 德國SCHLiNGEL國際兒少影展ECFA獎最佳歐洲兒童電影 Best European Film for Children, ECFA Awards, SCHLiNGEL 小企鵝塞瑪住在冰天雪地的國度，她的五歲生日就快到了，最大的心願就是辦一場生日派對，邀請家人和朋友來參加，但爸爸媽媽似乎沒有把她的期待放在心上。於是，塞瑪決定自行寄出邀請函給綠意之地的朋友威廉貓和蘇菲鼠，沒想到一個意外把自己也給寄過去了！為了送塞瑪返家，三隻小動物展開了一段奇幻的冒險之旅。 雷尼斯卡納艾里斯為電影導演、製片人和剪輯師，擔任拉脫維亞電影人協會主席，動畫導演處女作《蘋果滾動時》，榮獲多項最佳兒童動畫和評審團特別獎。本片中，他善用過去社會科學背景，細膩闡述孩童心理及家庭關係，並擴大至交友圈與外在社會，旅程最終在「家」收束，啟發孩童思考得失之間帶來的人際溫暖。 *此檔節目與台灣國際兒童影展（TICFF）共同策劃

tmdb_overview: 塞瑪的五歲生日就快到了！她住在冰天雪地的國度，最大的心願就是辦一場有家人和朋友一起參加的生日派對，但爸爸媽媽似乎沒有把她的期待放在心上。於是，塞瑪決定自己行動，寄出邀請函給住在遙遠大森林裡的朋友們，沒想到卻意外踏上一段前往大森林的奇妙旅程。
tmdb_overview_en: Thelma is a little penguin who is not like the others. She doesn’t like snow very much, or freezing water, and she wishes she could fly. Was that because she was born in the Great Forest, and partially raised by her best friends, Cat Vilhelm and Mouse Sophia?  Living in the Land of Ice again, Thelma also worries about her upcoming birthday. What if Birthday doesn’t find her snow-covered house - will she have to stay for forever? When Thelma tries to organize a Birthday Party for her forest friends, she tumbles into a great adventure that will teach her all she needs to know to become a proper penguin.

synopsis: 2026 日舞影展 Sundance FF 2026 柏林影展 Berlinale 樂壇打滾多年，終於憑藉現象級作品 《 》爆 紅的酷娃恰莉，事業與聲勢如日中天，她卻不懂自己怎麼就成了巨星？王牌團隊為她打造全方位演藝攻略，她瞬間擁有了曾經想望的一切，心底的虛幻與不安卻難以平息，而現實的發展更是一天比一天離奇。 巡演途中的恰莉將紛亂心聲化為訊息，發送給〈 〉、〈 〉 導演艾丹扎米里。兩人決定著手編劇，並找來曾為碧昂絲和宇多田光獻 藝，同時也是《 》多首金曲製作人的 操刀配樂。偽紀錄片手法刻劃了恰莉焦慮假想的虛構遭遇，對她而言卻是平行時空地獄版的真實自己。 一陣風騷操作引領， 重燃熱議未完再續。

synopsis: 1996 金馬獎最佳美術設計 Best Art Direction, Golden Horse Awards 1949年上海，船隻準備啟航前往海峽另一頭，姥姥因戰爭隨著將軍女婿移居 台 灣，眼前落腳處有著碩大庭院，夜晚的螢火蟲照亮了他們的笑容。姥姥照料著眾外孫，讓一家溫暖富足。 將軍 傷癒後退下戎馬身分， 妻子 忙著張羅生計，又懷上新生。時間流逝，孫子們長大，姥姥魂牽夢縈的，仍是河南老家那棵果實纍纍的紅柿子樹。 帶有半自傳色彩，王童在三部曲後歸返自身成長根源與歷史。《紅柿子》描繪國共內戰尾聲，一個軍人家族撤退來台的軍眷生活。

synopsis_en:
1996 Golden Horse Award for Best Art Direction.

Shanghai, 1949. As ships prepare to set sail for the other side of the Strait, Grandma follows her son-in-law, a General, to relocate to Taiwan amidst the chaos of war. Their new home boasts a sprawling courtyard where fireflies illuminate their smiles at night. Grandma meticulously cares for her many grandchildren, ensuring the family remains warm and well-provided for. After recovering from his wounds, the General retires from military life, while his wife busies herself making ends meet and prepares for the arrival of a new baby. As time passes and the grandchildren grow up, Grandma’s heart remains tethered to the memory of the fruit-laden red persimmon tree back in her Henan home.

Semi-autobiographical in nature, director Wang Tung returns to his own roots and history following his renowned trilogy. *Red Persimmons* depicts the daily lives of a military family retreating to Taiwan during the final stages of the Chinese Civil War.

synopsis: 張嘉樂是一個都市現代女性，與其他好姐妹一同住在高級公寓，美麗、能幹、有多餘的時間和精力。她們擺脫了對男性的依賴，但仍然追求男性的愛情，更因而陷於有婦之夫的謊言，她們最終能否掌握自我的命運？ 劇本靈動且具現代感，細緻地捕捉了都市女性在情慾與自主間的拉扯。劉嘉玲光芒四射的演出，讓人不禁聯想到她在王家衛的破格之作《阿飛正傳》中，既世故又純真的獨特氣質。導演區丁平原為美術指導，1983年首執導演筒，即展露其敘事新銳前衛、藝術品味獨特，深思細膩的特質，實屬香港新浪潮的寶藏作者之一。

tmdb_overview: Carole and Mandy have just become neighbors in a luxury apartment complex. Mandy is a successful career woman, educated and independent. Carole is a kept woman, dreaming of the day when her businessman lover will divorce his wife to marry her. Through Mandy, Carole meets Edgar, a neurotic headwaiter. She breaks off her affair with the businessman, but Edgar is still masochistically involved with his old girlfriend Alice. Carole realizes that she still has a lot to learn about life. And nothing is going to stop her from learning it.

tmdb_overview_en: After summer vacation, So-ri transfers to a new school and finds an anonymous letter in her desk drawer with an introduction to the school and a clue to finding the next letter.  "If you want to keep reading, find my second letter!" While following the clues in the letters and searching all over the school like on a treasure hunt, So-ri keeps running into a same-aged student named Dong-soon. So-ri and Dong-soon quickly become friends as they search for the letters together. As she finds one letter after another, the special connection continues, and So-ri's curiosity grows for the mysterious sender. "I want to find the last letter and thank you in person."

tmdb_overview_en: The night after another unsatisfactory New Year's party, Tim's father tells his son that the men in his family have always had the ability to travel through time. They can't change history, but they can change what happens and has happened in their own lives. Thus begins the start of a lesson in learning to appreciate life itself as it is, as it comes, and most importantly, the people living alongside us.

synopsis: 2023 香港電影節 Hong Kong IFF 2023 紐約亞洲影展 New York Asian FF 2023 東京影展 Tokyo IFF 嶄露頭角的張國榮、剛走紅的湯鎮業、初登銀幕的夏文汐和葉童，兩男兩女敢愛敢恨，既有出身富裕，亦有草根階層，於虛無、失序、慾望中，在城市開展現代遊牧生活，直到一名日本極左翼激進組織「赤軍」叛徒意外現身，令眾人陷入殺戮危機……。 香港新浪潮導演譚家明衝破道德禁忌之作，上映時因情慾情節而轟動一時，劇本集結多位華語編劇名將之力，以尼采思想刻劃1980年代躁動青春與慾望解放，呼應1950年代日本「太陽族」的狂放遺風，成就雋永﹑迷人不羈的異色經典。於面世41週年之際，導演重新剪輯，以更臻完美的4K修復版本與觀眾見面。

synopsis_en:
Hong Kong International Film Festival 2023 | New York Asian Film Festival 2023 | Tokyo International Film Festival

Featuring a rising Leslie Cheung, a newly famous Ken Tong, and the screen debuts of Pat Ha and Cecilia Yip, this film follows four young people—two men and two women from both privileged and working-class backgrounds—who live boldly and love fiercely. Amidst a landscape of nihilism, disorder, and desire, they lead a modern nomadic life in the city. However, their world is upended when a defector from the Japanese Red Army, a radical far-left organization, unexpectedly appears, plunging them into a lethal crisis.

A provocative masterpiece by Hong Kong New Wave director Patrick Tam, the film caused a sensation upon its original release for its bold eroticism. With a script crafted by a team of legendary Chinese screenwriters, it employs Nietzschean thought to portray the restless youth and sexual liberation of the 1980s. Echoing the rebellious "Sun Tribe" (Taiyozoku) subculture of 1950s Japan, it has become an enduring and mesmerizing cult classic. To mark its 41st anniversary, the director has re-edited the film, presenting a definitive 4K restored version.

tmdb_overview: 俊晞與拓從小就是形影不離的好朋友。然而，在大學的一場戲劇公演之後，拓向俊晞告白，兩人從此成為戀人。事實上，拓早已將對俊晞的情感深藏心中許久。他們開始了一段秘密交往，但面對各種現實的考驗與阻礙，兩人的關係也迎來巨大的試煉。這是一部凝聚青春光輝與淡淡憂傷的、酸甜動人的初戀愛情故事。
tmdb_overview_en: Childhood friends Junxi and Han Tuo have grown up side by side, sharing dreams, secrets, and an unspoken bond that deepens as they enter adulthood. When Han Tuo finally confesses his long-hidden love, their friendship shifts into a fragile romance tested by family pressure, career expectations, and the fear of losing each other. As Junxi struggles with harassment at work and Han Tuo faces demands to abandon his architectural dreams, the two must confront what they truly want. The Last Promise weaves their journey into a more emotional, cinematic arc, blending new scenes with their story of first love, courage, and the vow that could either bind them together or become their final goodbye.

synopsis: ★改編自累計銷量超過100萬冊；作家鳥飼茜同名漫畫 ★新生代實力派女星奈緒挑戰演出 原美鈴（奈緒 飾）是一位站在講台高處觀察學生的高中老師，她向來不干涉學生，只想過著平靜的生活，早藤雅巳（風間俊介 飾）是美鈴閨密美奈子（三吉彩花 飾）的未婚夫，他強暴了美鈴，儘管美鈴多次想結束和早藤的關係，卻沉溺在慾望中掙扎，某日，美鈴班上的男學生新妻（豬狩蒼彌 飾）向她吐露了性愛煩惱，令美鈴感同身受，不由自主地向新妻傾訴隱藏在內心深處的真心話，新妻也說出自己的心聲，並對真誠接納他的美鈴產生好感，這也讓這段扭曲的四角關係逐漸失去平衡，開始失控。 https://reurl.cc/r0mg2k
tmdb_overview: 原美鈴(奈緒 飾)是一位站在講台高處觀察學生的高中老師。她向來不干涉學生，只想過著平靜的生活。然而，在早藤雅已(風間俊介 飾)出現後，生活開始有了急遽變化。早藤是美鈴閨密美奈子(三吉彩花 飾)的未婚夫，他強暴了美鈴，儘管美鈴多次想結束和早藤的關係，卻沉溺在慾望中掙扎，早藤便把她視為隨時可以陪睡的女人。 某日，美鈴班上的男學生新妻(豬狩蒼彌 飾)向她吐露了性愛煩惱，令美鈴感同身受，不由自主地向新妻傾訴隱藏在內心深處的真心話，新妻也說出自己的心聲，並對真誠接納他的美鈴產生好感。這也讓這段扭曲的四角關係逐漸失去平衡，開始失控。
tmdb_overview_en: Misuzu Hara (Nao) works as a high school teacher and prefers to keep a distance from her students. In her past, she was raped by her best friend’s boyfriend Hayafuji after he found out she liked him. She didn't report the crime to the police and she didn't tell anyone else what happened. She still suffers from the trauma from what happened, but she continues to have a forceful relationship with Hayafuji who is now her best friend’s fiancee. One day, a rumor spreads that her student Yuki Niizuma is in a secret affair. Misuzu Hara, as his teacher, has a meeting with him to provide counseling.

cinema_name: 臺灣當代文化實驗場 C-LAB
movie_title: 「冷戰認知敘事」系列座談Ｉ：黃立慧《時間的女兒》中的「誤讀」
synopsis: 時間｜2026.07.10（五）19:30-21:30 地點｜臺灣當代文化實驗場 CREATORS空間303多功能室（臺北市大安區建國南路一段177號） 與談｜黃立慧（藝術家）、吳思鋒（劇評人）、陳韋鑑（藝評人） 主持｜張宗坤（陽明交通大學社會與文化研究所博士生） ▍座談簡介 「立慧從小就感受到英武跟別人不大一樣。」 一切都是從「誤讀」開始的：父親被錯認的意識形態與政治信念，從審訊、入獄一路延續至今，且不斷為歷史檔案、紀念與詮釋所鞏固並制度化。英武再三交代立慧：「大方向不要搞錯。」在歷史成為「記憶與記憶的鬥爭」的當下，究竟何謂「正確」？如何展開，才能不致誤讀？如果說，「誤讀」啟動了當年《時間的女兒》的創作，那麼，隨著作品加入論述戰局，又該怎麼再一次閱讀／對抗誤讀，在恆動的校準與逃逸中指引出實踐路徑？ 藝術家黃立慧自2017年起開啟「家庭連續劇」系列作品，主要關注並辨認歷史／國家敘事，如何經由「家庭」這個社會基本單位，在後冷戰時期成型、流傳。正值藝術家於進駐期間投身完結篇《910 Highview》的創作，本系列講座將回頭梳理「家庭連續劇」的十年發展軌跡，從個別作品切入，重新檢視其所處的政治及藝術語境，藉此思索新作的定位及策略。 此刻回望亦旨在直面與該系列共時發生、卻持續相互拉扯的白色恐怖／轉型正義創作趨勢。講座將此一歷史背景置放於「冷戰認知敘事」的問題意識中，並以「誤讀」、「翻譯」、「人造」三個子題為線索，分別對應該系列依序發表之《時間的女兒》（2017）、《我媽媽是個好德國人》（2020）、《月桃B面》（2021），進一步探問作品背後的歷史時空環境，以及世代感性經驗所折射出的冷戰概念，或者當下的燭光倒影。 ▍藝術家簡介 ♦︎ 黃立慧 專職藝術家。2008年國立臺北教育大學藝術與造型設計學系藝術創作組碩士，2013年芝加哥藝術學院創作碩士（主修行為藝術）。創作主要從自身困頓出發，進而討論人作為個體及群體的各種關聯界限，企圖在大敘事跟個人史中找出接點，以擴延議題的感知面向。媒材包括行為、錄像、裝置，尤其關注行為現場和文件痕跡的時間對應性，並嘗試發展因地制宜的呈現形式。近十年發表的「家庭連續劇」系列作，聚焦於探究集體敘事的縫隙。入圍第19屆及第20屆台新藝術獎獎，作品曾在臺灣／美國／德國／墨西哥等多地展出。 個人網站 ▍與談人簡介 ♦︎ 吳思鋒 劇評人、編輯。久居花東。主以書寫與編輯工作參與劇場，兼及策劃、製作。 ♦︎ 陳韋鑑 現職素人當代藝術創作教學（胖老師繪畫攝影教室負責人）、藝評寫作。曾任台新藝術基金會特約藝評（2013-2024），文章散見於《典藏》、《藝術家》等媒體。著有《台灣攝影家系列：郭英聲》（2019）。關心當代藝術，期待以書寫與教學讓更多人親近之。 ▍主持人簡介 ♦︎ 張宗坤 陽明交通大學社會與文化研究所博士生，研究興趣橫跨冷戰、基礎設施與勞動，關注藝文場域中的歷史再現及其政治性。藝評文字散見於《表演藝術評論台》、《PAR表演藝術雜誌》、《典藏ARTouch》、《CLABO實驗波》等處。 個人網站 ▍ 系列座談預告 7/25（六）19:30-21:30｜《我媽媽是個好德國人》中的「翻譯」：王柏偉Ｘ汪俊彥Ｘ童詠瑋 8/11（二）19:00-21:00｜《月桃B面》中的「人造」：王聖閎Ｘ周伶芝Ｘ謝鎮逸 ────── 講座策劃｜黃立慧、童詠瑋 主辦單位｜臺灣當代文化實驗場、CREATORS創作／研發支持計畫
screen_name: CREATORS空間303多功能室
synopsis_en:
**Time:** Friday, July 10, 2026 | 19:30–21:30
**Location:** Multi-function Room 303, CREATORS Space, Taiwan Contemporary Culture Lab (C-LAB) (No. 177, Sec. 1, Jianguo S. Rd., Da’an Dist., Taipei City)
**Panelists:** Huang Li-hui (Artist), Wu Ssu-feng (Theater Critic), Chen Wei-chien (Art Critic)
**Moderator:** Chang Tsung-kun (PhD Student, Institute of Social Research and Cultural Studies, NYCU)

### ▍Talk Introduction
"Since she was a child, Li-hui felt that Ying-wu was different from others."

It all began with a "misreading": a father’s ideology and political beliefs were misidentified, leading to interrogation and imprisonment—a process that continues to this day, consolidated and institutionalized by historical archives, commemorations, and interpretations. Ying-wu repeatedly instructed Li-hui: "Don't get the general direction wrong." In an era where history has become a "struggle between memory and memory," what exactly is "correct"? How can one begin to unpack this without falling into further misreading? If "misreading" triggered the creation of *The Daughter of Time* years ago, then as the work enters the battlefield of discourse, how should we read—or resist misreading—once more? How do we navigate a path of practice through constant calibration and escape?

Since 2017, artist Huang Li-hui has been developing her *Family Soap Opera* series, which focuses on identifying how historical and national narratives are formed and circulated through the "family"—the fundamental unit of society—in the post-Cold War era. As the artist immerses herself in the creation of the series' finale, *910 Highview*, during her residency, this lecture series will trace the ten-year trajectory of *Family Soap Opera*. By examining individual works, the talks will re-evaluate the political and artistic contexts they inhabit to reflect on the positioning and strategy of her new work.

This retrospective also aims to confront the prevailing trends in art related to the White Terror and transitional justice that have emerged alongside this series. The lecture situates this historical background within the problem of "Cold War cognitive narratives," using three sub-themes—"Misreading," "Translation" (July 25), and "Artificiality" (August 11)—as clues. These correspond respectively to the series' sequential releases: *The Daughter of Time* (2017), *My Mother is a Good German* (2020), and *Alpinia B-side* (2021). The talk will further explore the historical environments behind these works and the Cold War concepts—or contemporary reflections—mirrored through generational sensibilities.

---

### ▍Artist Profile
**♦︎ Huang Li-hui**
A full-time artist, Huang holds an MFA in Art and Design from National Taipei University of Education (2008) and an MFA in Performance Art from the School of the Art Institute of Chicago (2013). Her work often stems from personal dilemmas, exploring the boundaries between individuals and collectives. She seeks to find the intersection between grand narratives and personal histories to expand the perceptual dimensions of her subjects. Her media include performance, video, and installation, with a particular focus on the temporal correspondence between live performance and documentary traces. Her decade-long series *Family Soap Opera* explores the gaps in collective narratives. She has been nominated for the 19th and 20th Taishin Arts Awards, and her work has been exhibited in Taiwan, the US, Germany, and Mexico.

---

### ▍Panelist Profiles
**♦︎ Wu Ssu-feng**
A theater critic and editor based in Hualien/Taitung. He participates in theater primarily through writing and editing, as well as curation and production.

**♦︎ Chen Wei-chien**
Currently a teacher of contemporary art for amateurs (Director of "Fat Teacher" Painting and Photography Studio) and an art critic. He served as a contributing critic for the Taishin Bank Foundation for Arts and Culture (2013–2024). His writings appear in *Artco*, *Artist Magazine*, and other media. He is the author of *Taiwan Photographers Series: Quo Ying-sheng* (2019). He is dedicated to contemporary art and hopes to make it more accessible through writing and teaching.

---

### ▍Moderator Profile
**♦︎ Chang Tsung-kun**
A PhD student at the Institute of Social Research and Cultural Studies, National Yang Ming Chiao Tung University. His research interests span the Cold War, infrastructure, and labor, with a focus on historical representation and its politics within the arts. His art criticism can be found in the *Performing Arts Review*, *PAR Magazine*, *ARTouch*, and *CLABO*.

---

**Further Reading:**
*   Introduction to *The Daughter of Time*
*   Wang Sheng-hung, "Historical Hardship at the Other End of the Lever: A Short Review of Huang Li-hui’s Solo Exhibition 'The Daughter of Time'"
*   Chen Wei-zhen, "Using Nothingness as Being, Lightness as Weight: Huang Li-hui’s 'The Daughter of Time'"
*   Chen Wei-chien, "Huang Li-hui’s Solo Exhibition 'The Daughter of Time'"
*   Huang Hai-ming, "So Close Yet So Far: Reading 'The Daughter of Time' at Haiton Art Center"
*   Introduction to the *910 HIGHVIEW* Project

**Lecture Curators:** Huang Li-hui, Tung Yung-wei
**Organizer:** Taiwan Contemporary Culture Lab (C-LAB), CREATORS Creation/Research Support Program

tmdb_overview: 高校美眉薇拉是女足校隊的隊長，但因比賽連連慘敗，女足遭到學校解散。熱愛足球的她靈機一動找來造型師好友幫忙，讓她搖身一變成為哥哥賽巴斯丁轉學踢球去！薇拉萬萬沒想到自己會愛上自己的足球隊友兼室友、人稱高貴公爵的杜克…可是杜克卻對薇拉充滿敵意，只因暗戀的女生奧莉薇亞對變裝後的薇拉有興趣？！
tmdb_overview_en: Viola Hastings is in a real jam. Complications threaten her scheme to pose as her twin brother, Sebastian, and take his place at a new boarding school. She falls in love with her handsome roommate, Duke, who loves beautiful Olivia, who has fallen for Sebastian! As if that were not enough, Viola's twin returns from London ahead of schedule but has no idea that his sister has already replaced him on campus.

synopsis: ★格林童話《白雪公主》X 安徒生童話《紅菱艷》 ★《神鬼奇航》作曲家傑夫澤內利鼎力製作 ★全球票房3.1億臺幣 七名帥氣的王子因為中了詛咒而被變成七個小矮人，唯一能解除詛咒的方法，是親吻王國裡最美麗的女子。另一方面，白雪公主的外貌雖然與七矮人理想中的美女大相逕庭，她卻意外穿上一雙紅鞋，有魔力的紅鞋讓她獲得自己從未想過的美貌。七矮人是否能向王國裡最美的女子索取一吻，以破除魔咒呢？不過究竟誰才是世界上最美的女子？而所謂的「美」究竟又代表了什麼意思？ https://reurl.cc/4lAQmY

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 2025 新加坡影展 Singapore IFF ★ 7/11場次由亞洲電影資料館資深典藏員周世寶出席映後座談 Post-screening talk with Asian Film Archive Senior Archivist Tee Pao CHEW 來自台灣的林黛玉至新加坡豪門賈府作客，初識遊手好閒的富家子弟賈寶玉，薛寶釵也自美國前來，三人形成微妙的三角關係。事實上賈家早已家道中落，徒留門面，終日沉迷賭馬，希冀發財翻身。王熙鳳企圖湊合寶玉和寶釵，謀取薛家財富。就在寶玉和寶釵的新婚之日，黛玉決定返回台灣，寶玉該如何抉擇？ 改編自中國四大古典名著《紅樓夢》，導演邱剛健別出心裁地將恩怨情仇轉譯至1970年代，正值經濟騰飛的新加坡。本片由亞洲電影資料館完成修復，團隊採用全球碩果僅存，存放於本中心的35mm拷貝進行數位掃描。由於膠卷損毀極其嚴重，現有技術已難以達成美學與技術並重的色彩復原，最終決定以黑白進行修復，讓消失多年的聲影重現於世。

tmdb_original_title: 紅樓夢醒 / 新潮紅樓夢
tmdb_overview: Set against the backdrop of the wealthy Jia clan’s slow financial decline, Jia Bao-yu falls in love with his cousin Lin Dai-yu, newly arrived from Taiwan. Their growing mutual affection gets derailed when their family’s materialistic interests and another cousin from the United States comes between them.  Considered one of the four great masterworks of Chinese literature, Chiu’s adaptation reimagines this classical saga by transposing it to 1970s Singapore, featuring a largely local cast and weaving in various idiosyncratic film tropes popular at the time. In this rare rediscovery, Dream of the Red Chamber offers a unique and uncommon glimpse into early independent and transnational filmmaking in a rapidly developing post-independence Singapore.
tmdb_overview_en: Set against the backdrop of the wealthy Jia clan’s slow financial decline, Jia Bao-yu falls in love with his cousin Lin Dai-yu, newly arrived from Taiwan. Their growing mutual affection gets derailed when their family’s materialistic interests and another cousin from the United States comes between them.  Considered one of the four great masterworks of Chinese literature, Chiu’s adaptation reimagines this classical saga by transposing it to 1970s Singapore, featuring a largely local cast and weaving in various idiosyncratic film tropes popular at the time. In this rare rediscovery, Dream of the Red Chamber offers a unique and uncommon glimpse into early independent and transnational filmmaking in a rapidly developing post-independence Singapore.

synopsis: ★2025伊朗曙光旬電影節最佳動畫電影、觀眾票選獎 ★全球票房1千4百萬台幣 海豚男孩與夥伴持續對抗海中怪物，某天島民馬傑在漂流瓶中發現關於神祕藥水的線索，讓這趟旅程走向全新的未知，出航途中，他們不幸遇到巨鯨，馬傑因此失蹤，海豚男孩危險的救援行動，同時得知父親可能就在附近，為了尋找家人的線索與自己的身世，他毅然踏上更深的海域……吉德喝下藥水後變成了可怕的怪物。在包括航海家、他的妻子萊拉和島民在內的盟友的幫助下，海豚男孩最終成功擊敗了馬吉德。 https://reurl.cc/Em3G2A
synopsis_en:
★ Winner of Best Animated Feature and the Audience Award at the 2025 Fajr International Film Festival
★ Global Box Office: 14 Million TWD

Dolphin Boy and his companions continue their relentless battle against the monsters of the deep. Their journey takes an unexpected turn when a villager named Majeed discovers a message in a bottle containing clues about a mysterious potion, leading them toward a brand-new unknown. During their voyage, they encounter a massive whale, and Majeed goes missing in the chaos.

As Dolphin Boy embarks on a perilous rescue mission, he learns that his father may be nearby. Driven by the hope of finding his family and uncovering the secrets of his origins, he resolutely ventures into even deeper waters. After Jid drinks the potion and transforms into a terrifying monster, Dolphin Boy—with the help of allies including the Navigator, his wife Leila, and the islanders—must face his greatest challenge yet to finally defeat Majeed.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1987 香港電影金像獎最佳劇本﹑最佳女配角 Best Screenplay & Best Suppoting Actress, Hong Kong Film Awards 米舖少東、模特兒、兩名來自台灣，亟欲成名的女子，四人背景各異，卻同樣耽溺於青春的靈魂，在生命的虛空中相互依偎。直到一場突如其來的命案，令前來緝兇的探長悄然成為這場混沌愛欲的見證人。 導演關錦鵬洞悉現代人的存在危機，在邱剛健筆下，電影顛覆了傳統懸疑劇的起承轉合，反而冷眼剖析人際關係的曖昧與疏離。全片瀰漫著死亡與性的隱喻，而無關道德批判。周潤發飾演的探長如同鏡子般投射出四人對愛的渴求與幻滅，精準預言迎向世紀末時，香港的集體焦慮。 Four lost souls—a rice merchant, a model, and two young women from Taiwan—cling to each other in existential emptiness. When a sudden murder strikes, the detective becomes a quiet witness not only to doom, but also to their chaotic desires. Inspired by director Stanley Kwan's real-life experience, Chiu Kang-chien's screenplay eschews traditional mystery to dissect the ambiguity of human intimacy, with the detective mirroring their futile longing for love—a poignant reflection of Hong Kong's fin-de-siècle anxiety.

synopsis: 2021 SXSW影展 SXSW FF 2021 多倫多Inside Out LBGT影展 Inside Out Toronto LGBT FF 2021 雪菲爾德紀錄片影展 Sheffield IDF 2020年春季，原 定 展開巡演的恰莉困於疫情，偕男友居家隔離。封閉時局強碰熾熱戀情，雙雙刺激創作慾，恰莉將設備搬到家裡，宅錄多首自在奔放的beat，同步直播匯集悶壞的粉絲共襄盛舉。 LGBTQIA+的Angels來自世界各地，線上共譜詞曲彷彿沒有距離，助恰莉只花六週就完成專輯，推出後廣獲樂評激推肯定，堪稱恰莉最具代表性的作品之一。 雙導演以類Vlog的影像形式，捕捉恰莉最真實的本心，也見證她跨越音樂、視覺與社群的獨特凝聚力。結晶專輯《How I'm Feeling Now》相對簡單粗礪，電子碎拍與清爽旋律卻洋溢真誠及親密。在紀錄／偽紀錄之間，《一同孤獨》和《絢爛一刻》 這兩部片 穿越敘事與時序，鏡射出360度的酷娃恰莉。 In spring 2020, Charli XCX's tour was halted by the pandemic. Quarantining with her boyfriend, isolation and romance fueled her creativity. She recorded raw beats at home, livestreaming with global LGBTQIA+ "Angels" to co-write her acclaimed album

tmdb_overview: 一個在豪華郵輪誕生的棄嬰、名喚「1900」的傳奇人生，他從小以海為家，後來成為天才鋼琴師，卻終生不肯踏上陸地，直到一天遇到了愛人，他決定踏出郵輪…
tmdb_overview_en: Musician Max Tooney goes to sell his prized Conn trumpet to a music shop, where he plays the instrument one last time. The shopkeeper recognises the song as one on a record matrix he found and asks who the piece is by. Tooney tells the story of an infant found abandoned in the first class dining room of the four-stacker ocean-liner SS Virginian on 1 January 1900. Danny Boodman, a coal-man from the boiler room, names the boy Danny Boodman T. D. Lemon 1900, after himself, the fruit crate the boy was found in, and the year, and raises him as his own.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title: 怪奇比莉－溫柔重擊巡迴演唱會 3D 電影（2D版）
movie_title_en: Billie Eilish - Hit Me Hard and Soft: The Tour (Live in 3D) *2D version
director: 詹姆斯卡麥隆 James CAMERON、怪奇比莉 Billie Eilish
synopsis: 演場會電影往往受限於現場燈光、音效、人聲與機位，難以完整傳遞現場氣氛、還原歌手唱功與捕捉最佳觀看角度。然而本片透過特殊攝影系統與後製動態調光技術，突破了舊有限制，完整呈現怪奇比莉2025年7月於英國曼徹斯特的演場會現場。27首歌曲從木吉他伴奏清唱、現場疊錄比莉招牌溫柔呢喃，到電子混音重擊炸裂；其間穿插小段幕後花絮與貼身訪談，讓此片成為非看不可的當代演場會電影。 《阿凡達》金獎導演詹姆斯卡麥隆以其不斷革新的電影製作技術、精準掌鏡，以及現場對著 17個分割畫面時在腦海中即時剪接的超凡能力，加上從舞台燈光顏色、表演形式、歌曲重編與穿搭妝髮全部親力親為的歌手怪奇比莉，聯手將這場三專演唱會從現場觀眾的記憶化作銀幕上的永恆。 Co-directed by James Cameron and Billie Eilish, this 2026 immersive film reinvents the concert documentary genre. Across 27 tracks, the high-budget production utilizes cutting-edge 3D and hidden cameras to provide an unprecedented, first-person perspective and capture Billie's artistic range—from soft intimate acoustic sets and live-looped whispers to hard electronic bass drops. Interwoven with behind-the-scenes footage and personal interviews, the film serves as a complete and authentic record of contemporary live performance.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 學生們撿到一本妖怪書，而管東管西的爸媽竟變成了書上的妖怪！這樣可以嗎？本片為國際兒童影展「小導演大夢想」計畫創作，由銘傳國小學生及老師共同企劃，親身體驗電影 與停格動畫 製作，歷時半年拍攝，展現天馬行空的想像力。 爺爺的杏桃農場 艾力克斯 Z. 阿維拉 Alex Z. ｜墨西哥 Mexico、美國 USA｜2025｜DCP｜Color｜9min 2025 洛杉磯獨立短片獎最佳動畫短片銀獎 艾力克斯剛放假就被媽媽帶到爺爺的杏桃農場幫忙，親戚們動作俐落、刀子咻咻咻切個不停，他卻怎麼也跟不上，反而愈幫愈忙。在晨光慢慢亮起的農場裡，他能找到屬於自己的位置嗎？ 心戰擂台 瑪麗安娜烏爾里克森 Marianne ｜挪威 Norway｜2024｜DCP｜Color｜17min 2024 挪威Kristiansand國際兒童影展挪威短片最佳獎 2024 德國奧伯豪森國際短片影展歐洲競賽入圍 薇拉熱愛摔角，因怕痛而沒贏過一場比賽。她默默忍受父母離異的委屈，卻發現媽媽新男友的女兒，竟是摔角社明星同學，所有不甘與憤怒瞬間湧上心頭，她該如何面對下一場練習賽？ 從前有座山 杜震謙 TO Chun-him ｜ 香港 Hong Kong｜2025｜DCP｜Color｜17min 2025 義大利遠東影展 2025 希臘德拉瑪短片影展International Kiddo競賽單元 即將轉學的正光，計劃與好友們踢最後一場足球賽。然而，球場施工、廣場舞大媽也來搶場地，還有青少年設下的「鳥籠戰術」，這場餞別球賽真的能及時完成嗎？！ 雷那農場－屁股上的小麻煩 艾蓮娜瓦爾夫 Elena ｜德國 Germany｜2025｜DCP｜Color｜5min 2025 捷克茲林影展6歲以下最佳短篇動畫獎 Hermína Týrlová Award for Best Short Animation for Children up to 6 Years of Age, Zlín FF 小狗的屁股被刺蝟的刺扎得哀哀叫，動物們想盡辦法幫忙拔刺，小刺蝟也氣急敗壞地緊跟著他想要回自己的刺。小狗能順利解除危機嗎？ 夢想夏令營 金菲柏 Kim FABER｜荷蘭 The Netherlands｜2024｜DCP｜Color｜17min 11歲的蘿特罹患癌症後，生活就圍繞著醫院與治療。這部紀錄片拍攝她參加一個特別的夏令營，這裡的孩子跟她一樣，都在與疾病奮戰，她認識了許多新朋友， 一同拋下病情享受生命。 熱到喵掉 山謬霍洛瓦克斯 Samuel HOLOVACS｜美國 USA｜2025｜DCP｜Color｜5min 天氣實在太熱，冷氣機竟然也故障，在修好之前可得保持冷靜才行。家裡的貓咪餵飽後仍喵喵喵地叫，看來牠也熱到快要融化了⋯⋯。等等！熱到融化？可能嗎？ *此檔節目與台灣國際兒童影展（TICFF）共同策劃

synopsis_en:
Students find a book of monsters, and their overbearing parents turn into the creatures from its pages! Is this really okay? Created for the International Children's Film Festival's "Small Directors, Big Dreams" project, this film was co-planned by students and teachers from Ming Chuan Elementary School. Over six months of production, they experienced filmmaking and stop-motion animation firsthand, showcasing their boundless imagination.

**Grandpa's Apricot Farm**
Alex Z. Avila | Mexico, USA | 2025 | DCP | Color | 9min
*Silver Award for Best Animated Short, 2025 Los Angeles Independent Short Film Awards*
Just as his vacation begins, Alex is taken by his mother to help out at his grandfather's apricot farm. His relatives move with lightning speed, their knives slicing through fruit with a rhythmic "shoo-shoo-shoo," but Alex can't keep up—in fact, the more he tries to help, the more he gets in the way. As the morning sun slowly rises over the farm, will he be able to find his own place?

**Mind Battle**
Marianne Ulrichsen | Norway | 2024 | DCP | Color | 17min
*Best Norwegian Short, 2024 Kristiansand International Children's Film Festival; European Competition, 2024 International Short Film Festival Oberhausen*

synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★2020金馬獎最佳動畫短片 車燈前一雙瞪大的眼，公路上動物尖嘶未及消散，末班公車裡人性早失速，「是誰偷了我的項鍊？」撞到正，偏要亂，車廂裡乘客心裡都有鬼。私刑正義，看集體在殺人，故事急轉直下，道德連環追撞，徒任心跳如喇叭響，一聲大過一聲。 https://reurl.cc/Q2y7Vq

tmdb_overview_en: Oskar is on the night train heading home after an interview in Stockholm. With a long night ahead of him, he makes eye contact with Ahmad. For the first time, he meets the gaze of someone who feels the same desire as he does.

synopsis: ★2025 金馬獎最佳動畫短片 ★2025 威尼斯影展地平線短片競賽 ★《肉蛾天》、《夜車》謝文明導演最新作品 陰冷黑街外，霓虹光影在紅燈區閃爍，舞廳氣氛喧嘩熱鬧；頭戴水藍色假髮的美麗女子，流連聲色之中，四處魅惑對上眼的男人。交歡正值高潮，女子現出真身，濃厚血腥味下，埋藏一段傷心過往。異色駭人，妖獸可懼、渣男可鄙，卻都難擋女人眼中的銳利神采。 https://reurl.cc/Q2y7Vq
tmdb_overview: 一名濃妝豔抹的女子，每晚在酒吧誘捕男人，將其殺害後把屍體帶回巢穴餵養小孩，但在一次行動中意外失手，劇情也隨著失控的局勢逐步被揭露開來。
tmdb_overview_en: A mysterious woman prowls the city at night, drawing men into her web as she explores the dark depths of maternal instincts.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1985 金馬獎最佳女主角提名 Nominated for Best Leading Actress, Golden Horse Awards 育有一子的寶兒因結婚八年的丈夫出軌而協議離婚，加入單身好姐妹的社交圈，在恣意放縱的表面下共嚐孤獨；前夫與情人同居，卻對前妻無微不至的照顧念念不忘，毅然轉身試圖挽回婚姻。重歸舊好的兩人，卻發現橫亙在自由與家庭圍城之間的矛盾，從未真正解開。 原為藝人訓練班學生的關錦鵬在1970年代末由電視轉到電影圈，為許鞍華、翁維銓、區丁平等多位新浪潮大將擔任副導演。1985年初執導演筒即嶄露頭角，首作《女人心》更成為當年票房最高電影之一。有別於同期香港電影的粗獷寫實，邱剛健以細膩婉轉的筆觸探入現代女性的內心世界，盡顯雅致的文藝風範。關錦鵬多年後憶起與其合作的經驗，依然難忘邱剛健在創作上嚴苛自求，以及對劇本的極致嚴謹。

tmdb_overview: 2019年香港歷史性的風暴中，導演在赴台求學前一個月，因一則來自父親的消息，被無限期滯留在當下。隔年香港疫情封城，身在台灣的導演與留港父親展開漫長的Skype對話，沈默的鏡頭中滾動著巨大的憂傷與說不出口的困惑，穿越破碎的創傷記憶，兩個倖存的男人，試圖笨拙地觸碰彼此陌生而糾結的心。
tmdb_overview_en: During the turmoil of 2019 Hong Kong, before pursuing his studies in Taiwan, the director was abruptly frozen in the present by a message from his father. As Hong Kong entered a pandemic lockdown, the director, now in Taiwan, began to Skype call his father, unpacking his traumatic memories and their entangled hearts.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 張嘉樂是一個都市現代女性，與其他好姐妹一同住在高級公寓，美麗、能幹、有多餘的時間和精力。她們擺脫了對男性的依賴，但仍然追求男性的愛情，更因而陷於有婦之夫的謊言，她們最終能否掌握自我的命運？ 劇本靈動且具現代感，細緻地捕捉了都市女性在情慾與自主間的拉扯。劉嘉玲光芒四射的演出，讓人不禁聯想到她在王家衛的破格之作《阿飛正傳》中，既世故又純真的獨特氣質。導演區丁平原為美術指導，1983年首執導演筒，即展露其敘事新銳前衛、藝術品味獨特，深思細膩的特質，實屬香港新浪潮的寶藏作者之一。

tmdb_overview: Carole and Mandy have just become neighbors in a luxury apartment complex. Mandy is a successful career woman, educated and independent. Carole is a kept woman, dreaming of the day when her businessman lover will divorce his wife to marry her. Through Mandy, Carole meets Edgar, a neurotic headwaiter. She breaks off her affair with the businessman, but Edgar is still masochistically involved with his old girlfriend Alice. Carole realizes that she still has a lot to learn about life. And nothing is going to stop her from learning it.

And nothing is going to stop her from learning it.

synopsis: 1996 金馬獎最佳美術設計 Best Art Direction, Golden Horse Awards 1949年上海，船隻準備啟航前往海峽另一頭，姥姥因戰爭隨著將軍女婿移居 台 灣，眼前落腳處有著碩大庭院，夜晚的螢火蟲照亮了他們的笑容。姥姥照料著眾外孫，讓一家溫暖富足。 將軍 傷癒後退下戎馬身分， 妻子 忙著張羅生計，又懷上新生。時間流逝，孫子們長大，姥姥魂牽夢縈的，仍是河南老家那棵果實纍纍的紅柿子樹。 帶有半自傳色彩，王童在三部曲後歸返自身成長根源與歷史。《紅柿子》描繪國共內戰尾聲，一個軍人家族撤退來台的軍眷生活。
source_language_note: 發音：國語 字幕：中英
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
1996 Golden Horse Award for Best Art Direction.

Shanghai, 1949. As ships prepare to set sail for the other side of the Strait, Grandma follows her son-in-law, a General, to relocate to Taiwan amidst the chaos of war. Their new home boasts a sprawling courtyard where fireflies illuminate their smiles at night. Grandma meticulously cares for her many grandchildren, ensuring the family remains warm and well-provided for. After recovering from his wounds, the General retires from military life, while his wife busies herself making ends meet and prepares for the arrival of a new baby. As time passes and the grandchildren grow up, Grandma’s heart remains tethered to the memory of the fruit-laden red persimmon tree back in her Henan home.

Semi-autobiographical in nature, director Wang Tung returns to his own roots and history following his renowned trilogy. *Red Persimmons* depicts the daily lives of a military family retreating to Taiwan during the final stages of the Chinese Civil War.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
movie_title_en: An Amorous Woman of Tang Dynasty
synopsis: 1984 一金馬獎最佳美術設計 Best Art Direction, Golden Horse Awards 晚唐奇女子魚玄機17歲棄俗從道，在道觀與煙花之地間流轉，某日結識遊俠崔博侯，以為兩人就此共浴愛河，他卻不辭而別。魚玄機深受情傷，在失落中與婢女綠翹產生愛恨糾葛。 主角魚玄機真有其人，為大名鼎鼎的晚唐詩人，曾言「易求無價寶，難得有情郎」。三位編劇，秦天南、方令正與邱剛健於古裝情色類型中，鑿開一方異色蹊徑，呈現出在父權秩序下拒絕被贖身、定義的現代主體性。夏文汐桀驁不馴的演出，成為香港新浪潮最具叛逆氣息的經典座標，映照出超越時代的女性風骨。
tags: 【紅樓暗湧：邱剛健編劇作品選】

tmdb_title: An Amorous Woman of Tang Dynasty
tmdb_title_en: An Amorous Woman of Tang Dynasty
tmdb_overview: 魚幼薇乃長安城著名才女，不屑嫁夫生子之平凡生活，入觀為女道士，道號玄機，玄機追求者大不乏人，但玄機一一拒絕，自與侍婢綠翹廝混。一次，玄機與眾文友在江邊作文酒之會，遇遊俠崔博侯在小舟上以江水清洗血劍，二人有如乾柴烈火，在蒼茫霧雨中訂情，好景不常，博侯與玄機繾綣數日即不辭而別，玄機一向自視甚高，經此打擊，心中悵恨，行為更加放浪，重回道觀煉丹，而丹藥中有催情成份，玄機服後慾火焚身，每與綠翹偷歡破壞清規，終被逐出道觀。
tmdb_overview_en: Rebellious Yu Yuan-gi becomes a Taoist priestess in order to avoid traditional roles designated to her as a woman by the society and focus on her studies and poetry. However, her trysts with both her maid and a ronin lead to trouble.

tmdb_overview: 被繁文縟節的皇宮生活壓得喘不過氣的英國公主，在進行例行性各國親善訪問時，偷溜出去羅馬大街，意外邂逅了來自美國的新聞記者，兩人從陌生到熟悉漸漸擦出愛的火花…
tmdb_overview_en: Overwhelmed by her suffocating schedule, touring European princess Ann takes off for a night while in Rome. When a sedative she took from her doctor kicks in, however, she falls asleep on a park bench and is found by an American reporter, Joe Bradley, who takes her back to his apartment for safety. At work the next morning, Joe finds out Ann's regal identity and bets his editor he can get exclusive interview with her, but romance soon gets in the way.

movie_title_en: The Night Beyond the Tricornered Window
synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔15） ★2021 金馬奇幻影展 ★改編自山下朋子的同名漫畫 ★全球票房破5千8百臺幣 書店店員三角夜路不用多走，只要摘下眼鏡就能見到鬼。天賦「異」稟的陰陽眼體質，害他受盡排擠，自小恐懼到大。除靈師冷川卻相中了他，邀他一起除魔；雙帥合璧自此無鬼不驅，更成了協助警探破案的最佳利器。女高中生非浦有著可控制別人的詛咒能力，成了連續分屍命案的頭號嫌疑犯。眾人追查後，發現冷川與非浦都有著不能說的祕密。當更大的危機朝著冷川迎面迎來，究竟三角是要真心換絕情，掉頭離去，還是為了冷川豁出去？ https://reurl.cc/L28Nbx

movie_title_en: To Be Killed by a High School Girl
synopsis: （註：本片分級為輔12） ★改編自《帝一之國》作者古屋兔丸同名漫畫原作 ★調教系BL漫改《性之劇藥》導演城定秀夫大膽新作 ★日本票房1千1百萬臺幣 34歲的歷史老師東山春人（田中圭 飾），被調到著名的二鷹高中任教，他外表英俊，個性溫暖、和善，很快就擄獲了一群女學生的芳心，然而春人卻藏著一個不為人知的渴望——他想被一個漂亮的女高中生殺死。對這個奇怪的慾望感到極度癡迷的春人，按著籌畫的完美犯罪計畫，他開始接近四名獨特又漂亮的女高中生，真帆（南沙良 飾）、小葵（河合優實 飾）、京子（莉子 飾）及愛佳（茅島水樹 飾）。春人籌備九年的計畫，在這四位女高中生中，誰會成為殺害春人的人呢？11月八號文化祭當日，班級戲劇表演開始時，春人籌備已久的計畫，也將拉開序幕…… https://reurl.cc/j6Nlg2
tmdb_title: To Be Killed by a High School Girl
tmdb_title_en: To Be Killed by a High School Girl
tmdb_original_title: 女子高生に殺されたい
tmdb_overview: 東山春人（田中圭飾）表面看來是一名非常普通的男子，而實際上，他擁有著十分扭曲的性格，身為抖M的他一直渴望著想要被某人殺死。隨著年齡的增長，這種想要被殺死的願望越來越具體起來——春人不僅想要被殺死，而且必須是被女子高中生殺死。  為了能夠實現自己的願望，春人步入社會之後進入了高中成為了那裡的一名老師，並且最終在校園裡找到了自己的目標——佐佐木真帆（南沙良飾）。為了找到能夠被真帆殺死，但又不會令真帆產生愧疚感以及惹上麻煩的方法，春人開始了縝密的籌劃。
tmdb_overview_en: Higashiyama Haruto is a 34-year-old Japanese history teacher who combines good looks with an honest and friendly personality.  When he has been assigned to Nitaka High School, a school for advanced students, Haruto immediately attracts the attention of his female students.  But he has a secret that he cannot tell anyone; he wants to be killed by a beautiful high school girl.  Obsessed with such a bizarre desire, Haruto approaches four beautiful girls of different types, Maho, Aoi, Kyoko, and Aika, according to the perfect crime scenario he has devised.  Who among the four is the high school girl that Haruto has been longing to be killed by for nine years?

synopsis: 門票包含海水浴場門票（海水浴場最早1pm可以入場），本場地寵物友善

tmdb_overview: 一隻寂寞單身狗買了高科技機器人作伴，兩人在《動物方城市》般的紐約街頭共舞同歡，彷彿就此終結孤單。某天，他們在海灘上慵懶午睡，機器人醒來後卻再也無法動彈。命運將他們硬生生拆散，放任殘酷的思念將時光磨成鋒利的夢境。在無盡的等待中，他們幻想著重聚的那天。
tmdb_overview_en: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 2025 新加坡影展 Singapore IFF ★ 7/11場次由亞洲電影資料館資深典藏員周世寶出席映後座談 Post-screening talk with Asian Film Archive Senior Archivist Tee Pao CHEW 來自台灣的林黛玉至新加坡豪門賈府作客，初識遊手好閒的富家子弟賈寶玉，薛寶釵也自美國前來，三人形成微妙的三角關係。事實上賈家早已家道中落，徒留門面，終日沉迷賭馬，希冀發財翻身。王熙鳳企圖湊合寶玉和寶釵，謀取薛家財富。就在寶玉和寶釵的新婚之日，黛玉決定返回台灣，寶玉該如何抉擇？ 改編自中國四大古典名著《紅樓夢》，導演邱剛健別出心裁地將恩怨情仇轉譯至1970年代，正值經濟騰飛的新加坡。本片由亞洲電影資料館完成修復，團隊採用全球碩果僅存，存放於本中心的35mm拷貝進行數位掃描。由於膠卷損毀極其嚴重，現有技術已難以達成美學與技術並重的色彩復原，最終決定以黑白進行修復，讓消失多年的聲影重現於世。

tmdb_title_local: 紅樓夢醒 / 新潮紅樓夢
tmdb_original_title: 紅樓夢醒 / 新潮紅樓夢
tmdb_overview: Set against the backdrop of the wealthy Jia clan’s slow financial decline, Jia Bao-yu falls in love with his cousin Lin Dai-yu, newly arrived from Taiwan. Their growing mutual affection gets derailed when their family’s materialistic interests and another cousin from the United States comes between them.  Considered one of the four great masterworks of Chinese literature, Chiu’s adaptation reimagines this classical saga by transposing it to 1970s Singapore, featuring a largely local cast and weaving in various idiosyncratic film tropes popular at the time. In this rare rediscovery, Dream of the Red Chamber offers a unique and uncommon glimpse into early independent and transnational filmmaking in a rapidly developing post-independence Singapore.
tmdb_overview_en: Set against the backdrop of the wealthy Jia clan’s slow financial decline, Jia Bao-yu falls in love with his cousin Lin Dai-yu, newly arrived from Taiwan. Their growing mutual affection gets derailed when their family’s materialistic interests and another cousin from the United States comes between them.  Considered one of the four great masterworks of Chinese literature, Chiu’s adaptation reimagines this classical saga by transposing it to 1970s Singapore, featuring a largely local cast and weaving in various idiosyncratic film tropes popular at the time. In this rare rediscovery, Dream of the Red Chamber offers a unique and uncommon glimpse into early independent and transnational filmmaking in a rapidly developing post-independence Singapore.

synopsis: ★2017 日本電影學院最佳動畫提名 ★改編自熱賣 100 萬本的日本暢銷國民童書 黑貓魯道夫與最愛的主人理惠住在一起，某天牠為了逃離魚店老闆的追打而意外跳上長途貨車，不知不覺來到了大都會－東京。牠在那裡邂逅了讓所有貓都畏懼、看得懂人類文字的街貓老大可多樂。找不到回家方向的魯道夫，只能跟著深諳街頭生存之道的可多樂，展開一段流浪貓的冒險生活……究竟魯道夫能不能回到理惠的懷抱呢？可多樂又隱瞞了什麼不為人知的秘密？邀請大家跟著這群流浪貓們，一同探尋這個危機四伏的人類世界，盡情暢遊在溫暖動人的萌貓國度吧！ https://reurl.cc/vElkeA
tmdb_original_title: ルドルフとイッパイアッテナ
tmdb_overview: 小黑貓魯道夫總是黏在主人理惠身邊；一天，為了躲避魚販追捕，魯道夫混亂中搭上從岐阜前往東京的貨車。魯道夫人生地不熟，好在有當地貓老大「可多樂」的照顧。可多樂教他街頭生存之道、更教他讀書認字；學會看地圖的魯道夫，能如願回到理惠的身邊嗎？
tmdb_overview_en: Rudolf, a black stray cat, is suddenly separated from his beloved master. He unexpectedly wakes up in a long-distance truck that takes him to metropolis Tokyo. There, he meets Ippai-attena, a big boss cat feared by everyone in town. Unable to return home, Rudolf starts a life as a stray with Ippai-attena, but Ippai-attena isn't all that he seems to be.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1987 香港電影金像獎最佳劇本﹑最佳女配角 Best Screenplay & Best Suppoting Actress, Hong Kong Film Awards 米舖少東、模特兒、兩名來自台灣，亟欲成名的女子，四人背景各異，卻同樣耽溺於青春的靈魂，在生命的虛空中相互依偎。直到一場突如其來的命案，令前來緝兇的探長悄然成為這場混沌愛欲的見證人。 導演關錦鵬洞悉現代人的存在危機，在邱剛健筆下，電影顛覆了傳統懸疑劇的起承轉合，反而冷眼剖析人際關係的曖昧與疏離。全片瀰漫著死亡與性的隱喻，而無關道德批判。周潤發飾演的探長如同鏡子般投射出四人對愛的渴求與幻滅，精準預言迎向世紀末時，香港的集體焦慮。 Four lost souls—a rice merchant, a model, and two young women from Taiwan—cling to each other in existential emptiness. When a sudden murder strikes, the detective becomes a quiet witness not only to doom, but also to their chaotic desires. Inspired by director Stanley Kwan's real-life experience, Chiu Kang-chien's screenplay eschews traditional mystery to dissect the ambiguity of human intimacy, with the detective mirroring their futile longing for love—a poignant reflection of Hong Kong's fin-de-siècle anxiety.

tmdb_overview: Four young people spend their time living the wild life - until one of them is brutally murdered in a burglary. The survivors come under the scrutiny of an eccentric cop, and their underlying fears and regrets slowly but surely emerge.
tmdb_overview_en: Four young people spend their time living the wild life - until one of them is brutally murdered in a burglary. The survivors come under the scrutiny of an eccentric cop, and their underlying fears and regrets slowly but surely emerge.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
director: 雷尼斯卡納艾里斯 Reinis KALNAELLIS
country: 拉脫維亞 Latvia、盧森堡 Luxembourg
synopsis: 2024 德國SCHLiNGEL國際兒少影展ECFA獎最佳歐洲兒童電影 Best European Film for Children, ECFA Awards, SCHLiNGEL 小企鵝塞瑪住在冰天雪地的國度，她的五歲生日就快到了，最大的心願就是辦一場生日派對，邀請家人和朋友來參加，但爸爸媽媽似乎沒有把她的期待放在心上。於是，塞瑪決定自行寄出邀請函給綠意之地的朋友威廉貓和蘇菲鼠，沒想到一個意外把自己也給寄過去了！為了送塞瑪返家，三隻小動物展開了一段奇幻的冒險之旅。 雷尼斯卡納艾里斯為電影導演、製片人和剪輯師，擔任拉脫維亞電影人協會主席，動畫導演處女作《蘋果滾動時》，榮獲多項最佳兒童動畫和評審團特別獎。本片中，他善用過去社會科學背景，細膩闡述孩童心理及家庭關係，並擴大至交友圈與外在社會，旅程最終在「家」收束，啟發孩童思考得失之間帶來的人際溫暖。 *此檔節目與台灣國際兒童影展（TICFF）共同策劃
source_language_note: 發音：國語 字幕：中英
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
tmdb_overview: 塞瑪的五歲生日就快到了！她住在冰天雪地的國度，最大的心願就是辦一場有家人和朋友一起參加的生日派對，但爸爸媽媽似乎沒有把她的期待放在心上。於是，塞瑪決定自己行動，寄出邀請函給住在遙遠大森林裡的朋友們，沒想到卻意外踏上一段前往大森林的奇妙旅程。
tmdb_overview_en: Thelma is a little penguin who is not like the others. She doesn’t like snow very much, or freezing water, and she wishes she could fly. Was that because she was born in the Great Forest, and partially raised by her best friends, Cat Vilhelm and Mouse Sophia?  Living in the Land of Ice again, Thelma also worries about her upcoming birthday. What if Birthday doesn’t find her snow-covered house - will she have to stay for forever? When Thelma tries to organize a Birthday Party for her forest friends, she tumbles into a great adventure that will teach her all she needs to know to become a proper penguin.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 1985 金馬獎最佳女主角提名 Nominated for Best Leading Actress, Golden Horse Awards 育有一子的寶兒因結婚八年的丈夫出軌而協議離婚，加入單身好姐妹的社交圈，在恣意放縱的表面下共嚐孤獨；前夫與情人同居，卻對前妻無微不至的照顧念念不忘，毅然轉身試圖挽回婚姻。重歸舊好的兩人，卻發現橫亙在自由與家庭圍城之間的矛盾，從未真正解開。 原為藝人訓練班學生的關錦鵬在1970年代末由電視轉到電影圈，為許鞍華、翁維銓、區丁平等多位新浪潮大將擔任副導演。1985年初執導演筒即嶄露頭角，首作《女人心》更成為當年票房最高電影之一。有別於同期香港電影的粗獷寫實，邱剛健以細膩婉轉的筆觸探入現代女性的內心世界，盡顯雅致的文藝風範。關錦鵬多年後憶起與其合作的經驗，依然難忘邱剛健在創作上嚴苛自求，以及對劇本的極致嚴謹。

synopsis: 中日戰爭烽火正熾，抗日游擊隊員林雪芬奉首領「天字第一號」之命，計畫炸毀漢奸丁邨的電訊總台；丁邨之侄世傑亦為游擊隊成員，潛伏丁宅蒐集情資，與一眾家僕裡應外合，殺得日軍措手不及。眼當任務即將告捷，雪芬與世傑卻雙雙被擒，生死存亡關頭，幕後運籌帷幄的「天字第一號」是否終將現身？ 導演黃卓漢出身廣東，國共內戰後移居香港從事電影映演及發行工作，1952年創立自由影業，1950年代曾來台拍攝《日月潭之戀》等國語片，長年與台灣影壇交流密切。1959年他另組嶺光影業，出品並親自執導多部粵語片。本片同樣改編自1946年國語版的《天字第一號》，由丁瑩、朱江、劉亮華等香港紅星主演，在原作基礎上融入竊聽、街頭槍戰、爆破等現代諜報動作元素，堪稱香港「珍姐邦」（Jane Bond）風潮的秀異之作。 "Special Agent No. 1."

tmdb_overview: Guerrilla fighter Lam Suet-fan is in charge of the operation which succeeds in crippling the traitorous activities of Ting Chuen. An infuriated Ting strikes back, swamping the occupied territory with spies and exposes the singer disguise of Lam's comrade Laura who is made his mistress. Through the discreet help from Ting's cousin Sai-kit who goes undercover as the traitor's house guest, a series of offensives are launched, resulting in heavy casualties in the Japanese camp. With pressure mounting on both sides, guerrilla leader Lady Spy No.1 entrusts the mission of bombing Ting's signal tower to Lam who will then lead the troop in retreat. The mission fails, leading to the arrest of Lam and Sai-kit. Laura puts her life at stake in order to accomplish the mission and before she expires, reveals herself to be their leader and names Lam her successor to lead the troop to its stronghold in the north. (Synopsis based on audiovisual materials)

tmdb_overview: 居住在倫敦西部的離婚男子威廉，擁有一家書店。一天，當紅的電影明星安娜史考特，居然來到威廉的書店。隨後他在街角竟不期然撞上安娜，手中的柳澄汁灑了她一身，感到抱歉的威廉邀安娜到他的住處更衣。威廉挽著全世界最有名的女人的手，走進了朋友的大門，度過了一個美好的夜晚。當他們回到飯店，卻發現安娜的男朋友從美國飛了過來，威廉只好默默離開。 半年之後，安娜為了逃開裸照風波，又來到了倫敦找威廉，他能把握這次的機會贏得巨星的芳心嗎?
tmdb_overview_en: London bookstore owner William Thacker's quiet life turns upside down when a chance encounter with famous actress Anna Scott sparks an unlikely romance challenged by their vastly different worlds.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 張嘉樂是一個都市現代女性，與其他好姐妹一同住在高級公寓，美麗、能幹、有多餘的時間和精力。她們擺脫了對男性的依賴，但仍然追求男性的愛情，更因而陷於有婦之夫的謊言，她們最終能否掌握自我的命運？ 劇本靈動且具現代感，細緻地捕捉了都市女性在情慾與自主間的拉扯。劉嘉玲光芒四射的演出，讓人不禁聯想到她在王家衛的破格之作《阿飛正傳》中，既世故又純真的獨特氣質。導演區丁平原為美術指導，1983年首執導演筒，即展露其敘事新銳前衛、藝術品味獨特，深思細膩的特質，實屬香港新浪潮的寶藏作者之一。

tmdb_overview: Carole and Mandy have just become neighbors in a luxury apartment complex. Mandy is a successful career woman, educated and independent. Carole is a kept woman, dreaming of the day when her businessman lover will divorce his wife to marry her. Through Mandy, Carole meets Edgar, a neurotic headwaiter. She breaks off her affair with the businessman, but Edgar is still masochistically involved with his old girlfriend Alice. Carole realizes that she still has a lot to learn about life. And nothing is going to stop her from learning it.

synopsis: 抗戰期間，日軍占領東北三省，少女翠英以賣唱維生，與愛國青年周凌雲相戀，卻被迫忍辱嫁給垂涎她的漢奸陳兆群。數年後，陳兆群任偽政府特務機關首腦，為全力追捕國民政府特務「天字第一號」而焦頭爛額。周凌雲作為其外甥，被國民政府吸收後潛入陳家任偽職，卻驚覺當年戀人已成為姑丈之續絃。情感受創之餘，他另起情緣，投身間諜行動，誓圖抗日復國。殊不知，原來叱咤風雲的抗日頭號間諜「天字第一號」竟是⋯⋯。 本片由金馬影帝柯俊雄與「千面女郎」白虹聯合主演，翻拍自1946年轟動上海、屠光啟執導的同名作品，為本土首部自製台語諜報片，不僅創下票房紀錄，更開啟台語間諜片風潮，前後衍生五集系列作品，盛況轟動一時，成為一代觀眾的共同記憶。 resistance agent "Special Agent No. 1," Ling-hun devotes himself to
source_language_note: 發音：台語 字幕：中英

synopsis_en:
During the War of Resistance against Japan, as the Japanese military occupied Northeast China, a young singer named Cuiying fell in love with a patriotic youth, Zhou Lingyun. However, she was forced to endure the humiliation of marrying the collaborator Chen Zhaoqun, who had long lusted after her. Years later, Chen has become the head of the puppet government’s secret service, desperately hunting for the Nationalist government’s legendary "Special Agent No. 1." Zhou Lingyun, now an agent himself, infiltrates Chen’s household under the guise of his nephew to take up a post in the puppet regime, only to be shocked to discover that his former lover is now his uncle’s second wife. Despite his heartbreak, he finds a new romance and dedicates himself to espionage, vowing to resist the occupation and restore the nation. Little did he know that the formidable "Special Agent No. 1" was actually...

Starring Golden Horse Best Actor Ko Chun-hsiung and the "Lady of a Thousand Faces" Pai Hung, this film is a remake of the 1946 Shanghai sensation directed by Tu Guangqi. As the first locally produced Taiwanese-language spy film, it not only shattered box office records but also ignited a craze for the genre, spawning a five-part series that became a cultural phenomenon and a collective memory for a generation of viewers.

synopsis: ★2001 日本新媒體動漫藝術節動畫部門大賞，與《神隱少女》並列 ★2002 安妮獎最佳動畫、最佳導演等四項提名 ★日本動畫大師今敏第二部長片作品，英國電影雜誌《Total Film》入選史上75部最佳動畫電影 從公主到忍者；從二戰到未來，女演員「藤原千代子」以各種角色現身於銀幕之中。她風靡一生，卻在最炙手可熱之時突然退隱。三十年後，一把神祕的鑰匙打開了她塵封已久的回憶與動人的愛情故事。 她不停奔跑著、追尋著，跨越時空的藩籬，打破現實的枷鎖。她始終昂首闊步，目光閃耀，信念篤定：「一定要見到那個人！」 到底被千代子封鎖隱藏的記憶是什麼？而神秘鑰匙又會開啟她什麼重要秘密？那正是在無情的時間洪流裡，當記憶與愛情最燦爛交會時，所浮現出最真實且永恆的一代巨星...... https://reurl.cc/xWyl9N
tmdb_overview: 藤原千代子將傾全部生命追尋一段摯愛，從公主到忍者；從二戰到未來，女演員「藤原千代子」以各種戲劇角色現身於銀幕之上。
tmdb_overview_en: Documentary filmmaker Genya Tachibana has tracked down the legendary actress Chiyoko Fujiwara, who mysteriously vanished at the height of her career. When he presents her with a key she had lost and thought was gone forever, the filmmaker could not have imagined that it would not only unlock the long-held secrets of Chiyoko’s life... but also his own.

movie_title_en: An Amorous Woman of Tang Dynasty
synopsis: 1984 一金馬獎最佳美術設計 Best Art Direction, Golden Horse Awards 晚唐奇女子魚玄機17歲棄俗從道，在道觀與煙花之地間流轉，某日結識遊俠崔博侯，以為兩人就此共浴愛河，他卻不辭而別。魚玄機深受情傷，在失落中與婢女綠翹產生愛恨糾葛。 主角魚玄機真有其人，為大名鼎鼎的晚唐詩人，曾言「易求無價寶，難得有情郎」。三位編劇，秦天南、方令正與邱剛健於古裝情色類型中，鑿開一方異色蹊徑，呈現出在父權秩序下拒絕被贖身、定義的現代主體性。夏文汐桀驁不馴的演出，成為香港新浪潮最具叛逆氣息的經典座標，映照出超越時代的女性風骨。

tmdb_overview: 魚幼薇乃長安城著名才女，不屑嫁夫生子之平凡生活，入觀為女道士，道號玄機，玄機追求者大不乏人，但玄機一一拒絕，自與侍婢綠翹廝混。一次，玄機與眾文友在江邊作文酒之會，遇遊俠崔博侯在小舟上以江水清洗血劍，二人有如乾柴烈火，在蒼茫霧雨中訂情，好景不常，博侯與玄機繾綣數日即不辭而別，玄機一向自視甚高，經此打擊，心中悵恨，行為更加放浪，重回道觀煉丹，而丹藥中有催情成份，玄機服後慾火焚身，每與綠翹偷歡破壞清規，終被逐出道觀。
tmdb_overview_en: Rebellious Yu Yuan-gi becomes a Taoist priestess in order to avoid traditional roles designated to her as a woman by the society and focus on her studies and poetry. However, her trysts with both her maid and a ronin lead to trouble.

movie_title_en: Intimate Confessions of a Chinese Courtesan
synopsis: ★ 7/4場次由資深影評人蒲鋒出席映後座談 Post-screening talk with film critic PO Fung 少女愛奴遭誘拐淪為娼妓，在肉慾橫流的「四季春」妓院中受盡凌辱。她孤注一擲，以同性禁戀換取鴇母春姨的絕世武藝，為化身冷豔花魁，向蹂躪她的嫖客報復，但與春姨那份始於算計的情仇，竟在血洗深仇的終點，徒留一抹難解的悵惘。 在陽剛暴力主宰銀幕的1970年代，邱剛健大膽挑戰情慾禁忌，將扭曲的愛與復仇交織成致命的動作與浪漫奇情之作。導演楚原構築出如夢似幻的罪惡之城，影像風格有如當時日本的異色剝削電影。即便放到當代眼光審視，本片在主流電影體制下所展現的先鋒與突破性，依舊令人震撼。

tmdb_overview_en: 18-year-old Ainu is kidnapped and sold to a brothel. Her good looks and wild personality make her very popular with the lustful clients, but also draw the lesbian attentions of brothel madam Chun Yi. Chun Yi teaches Ainu the ways of lust and the ways of kung fu, and Ainu becomes more and more similar to her captor. But rage at her treatment is still burning inside her.

synopsis: 1996 金馬獎最佳美術設計 Best Art Direction, Golden Horse Awards 1949年上海，船隻準備啟航前往海峽另一頭，姥姥因戰爭隨著將軍女婿移居 台 灣，眼前落腳處有著碩大庭院，夜晚的螢火蟲照亮了他們的笑容。姥姥照料著眾外孫，讓一家溫暖富足。 將軍 傷癒後退下戎馬身分， 妻子 忙著張羅生計，又懷上新生。時間流逝，孫子們長大，姥姥魂牽夢縈的，仍是河南老家那棵果實纍纍的紅柿子樹。 帶有半自傳色彩，王童在三部曲後歸返自身成長根源與歷史。《紅柿子》描繪國共內戰尾聲，一個軍人家族撤退來台的軍眷生活。

screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-小影格
synopsis_en:
1996 Golden Horse Award for Best Art Direction.

Shanghai, 1949. As ships prepare to set sail for the other side of the Strait, Grandma follows her son-in-law, a General, to relocate to Taiwan amidst the chaos of war. Their new home boasts a sprawling courtyard where fireflies illuminate their smiles at night. Grandma meticulously cares for her many grandchildren, ensuring the family remains warm and well-provided for. After recovering from his wounds, the General retires from military life, while his wife busies herself making ends meet and prepares for the arrival of a new baby. As time passes and the grandchildren grow up, Grandma’s heart remains tethered to the memory of the fruit-laden red persimmon tree back in her Henan home.

Semi-autobiographical in nature, director Wang Tung returns to his own roots and history following his renowned trilogy. *Red Persimmons* depicts the daily lives of a military family retreating to Taiwan during the final stages of the Chinese Civil War.

tmdb_overview: 艾力克斯佛萊契(休葛蘭飾)是一位過氣的80年代流行音樂歌手，目前上台演出的機會，卻僅剩下鄉村市集和遊樂園所舉辦的懷舊巡迴演唱會。直到當今流行歌壇小天后--卡羅柯曼找他寫歌、邀他一起對唱並錄製這支合唱歌曲時，這位極具魅力，而且才氣十足的音樂人，才終於獲得了翻身重返歌壇的機會。然而棘手的問題來了，已經好幾年都沒寫過半首歌，而且壓根從未填過歌詞的艾力克斯，該如何在短短幾天的時間裡，端出這首暢銷歌曲呢？
tmdb_overview_en: A washed-up '80s pop star gets a chance at a comeback when reigning pop diva Cora Corman invites him to write & record a duet with her, but there's a problem--Alex hasn't written a song in years; he's never written lyrics and he has to come up with a hit in a matter of days.

cinema_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心
synopsis: 2023 香港電影節 Hong Kong IFF 2023 紐約亞洲影展 New York Asian FF 2023 東京影展 Tokyo IFF 嶄露頭角的張國榮、剛走紅的湯鎮業、初登銀幕的夏文汐和葉童，兩男兩女敢愛敢恨，既有出身富裕，亦有草根階層，於虛無、失序、慾望中，在城市開展現代遊牧生活，直到一名日本極左翼激進組織「赤軍」叛徒意外現身，令眾人陷入殺戮危機……。 香港新浪潮導演譚家明衝破道德禁忌之作，上映時因情慾情節而轟動一時，劇本集結多位華語編劇名將之力，以尼采思想刻劃1980年代躁動青春與慾望解放，呼應1950年代日本「太陽族」的狂放遺風，成就雋永﹑迷人不羈的異色經典。於面世41週年之際，導演重新剪輯，以更臻完美的4K修復版本與觀眾見面。
tags: 【紅樓暗湧：邱剛健編劇作品選】
source_language_note: 發音：粵語﹑日語﹑英語﹑國語 字幕：中英
screen_name: 國家電影及視聽文化中心-大影格
synopsis_en:
Hong Kong International Film Festival 2023 | New York Asian Film Festival 2023 | Tokyo International Film Festival

Featuring a rising Leslie Cheung, a newly famous Ken Tong, and the screen debuts of Pat Ha and Cecilia Yip, this film follows four young people—two men and two women from both privileged and working-class backgrounds—who live boldly and love fiercely. Amidst a landscape of nihilism, disorder, and desire, they lead a modern nomadic life in the city. However, their world is upended when a defector from the Japanese Red Army, a radical far-left organization, unexpectedly appears, plunging them into a lethal crisis.

A provocative masterpiece by Hong Kong New Wave director Patrick Tam, the film caused a sensation upon its original release for its bold eroticism. With a script crafted by a team of legendary Chinese screenwriters, it employs Nietzschean thought to portray the restless youth and sexual liberation of the 1980s. Echoing the rebellious "Sun Tribe" (Taiyozoku) subculture of 1950s Japan, it has become an enduring and mesmerizing cult classic. To mark its 41st anniversary, the director has re-edited the film, presenting a definitive 4K restored version.

synopsis: KKday接駁車服務 讓大家能夠更方便地來往福隆，今天我們特別跟Skyline Film by Sea 合作，推出了 1.活動門票＋來回接駁一站搞定套票 票券包含：臺北車站 ↔ 福隆海水浴場來回車票＋電影票券＋福隆海水浴場門票

synopsis: ★2023 金馬奇幻影展 ★2023 日本學院獎最佳配樂提名 ★全球票房1億2千萬臺幣 「讓我，再次愛上你……」 1988年因圖書館借閱卡相識的月島雫與天澤聖司，在晨曦映照初醒的大地，許下十年的約定，聖司為了實現職業大提琴手的夢想遠赴義大利，兩人從此分隔兩地。時光匆匆，懷抱著作家夢想的雫已是一名兒童出版社編輯，每當遇到挫折時，她總會想起在異地的聖司來激勵自己。面對現實的層層考驗，眼看距離夢想越來越遠，對於未來也越加迷惘的雫，決定傾聽自己的聲音，動身前往某地。 https://reurl.cc/j6Nl9M
tmdb_overview: 1988 年，因圖書館借閱卡相識的月島雫與天澤聖司，在晨曦映照初醒的大地，許下十年的約定，聖司為了實現職業大提琴手的夢想遠赴義大利，兩人從此分隔兩地。時光荏苒，懷抱著作家夢想的雫已是一名兒童出版社編輯，每當遇到挫折時，她總會遙想在異地的聖司來激勵自己。現實的層層考驗當前，與夢想的距離越來越遠，對於未來漸感迷惘的雫，決定傾聽自己的聲音，動身前往某地。
tmdb_overview_en: Shizuku Tsukishima is a middle school student in the 3rd grade. She likes to read books. Shizuku meets Seiji Amasawa, who goes to the same class and school as Shizuku.
